Circle_1.Description: Air. This spell creates a protective cushion of air. The magician exhales slowly and  makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, air rushes  in under the target's clothing, pushing outward to create a cushion and providing  padding as well as ventilation. The target adds +3 Physical Armor and the effects of  fatigue are reduced (GM's discretion). If the target is not wearing clothing or armor he  receives no benefit'there is nothing to constrain the air cushion, so it disperses. This  spell is popular with elemental fire mining crews working near Death's Sea.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (minutes), Increase Effect (+1 Physical Armor),  Additional Target (+Rank)
Circle_1.Name: Air Armor
Crunch Climb
Circle_1.Description: Earth. This spell enhances climbing ability. The magician crouches down on all  fours and then touches the target as he begins to climb and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, the target gains a +3 Climbing test bonus.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 minutes), Increase Effect (+2 bonus), Additional Target (+Rank)

Circle_1.Name: Earth Darts
Circle_1.Description: Earth. This spell transforms earth into crystalline darts that fly toward a foe, temporarily  rending their armor in the process. The magician flings a handful of dirt into  the air and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful,  his Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted before Physical Armor  is reduced. The damage is only dealt once; the duration refers to the armor reducing  effect. The target's armor returns to normal at the end of the duration.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),  Increase Effect (-2 Physical Armor), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target  (+1)

Circle_1.Name: Flameweapon
Circle_1.Effect: Adds Step 4.D6 fire damage to weapon / Physical
Circle_1.Description: Fire. This spell enflames a weapon. The magician snaps his fingers and makes  a Spellcasting test against the wielder's Mystic Defense. If successful, a flame leaps  from his fingers and engulfs the weapon in fire, except for the part where it is held.  The wielder adds a D6 Bonus Die to the fiery weapon's Damage test. The spell can be  cast on weapons made from any material'wood, metal, bone, and so on. The flame  inflicts no physical damage to the weapon.  273   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Additional Target (+Rank)

Circle_1.Name: Heat Food
Circle_1.Description: Fire. This spell heats food and infuses it with beneficial magic.  The magician breathes on his hands as if to warm them, causing them to glow a  gentle red, then touches a meal and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the  glow transfers to the food which, within a minute, becomes steaming hot. Eating the  food increases the effectiveness of Recovery tests. Consumption of a heated meal adds  a +4 bonus to his next Recovery test.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+1 meal)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 bonus), Increase Effect (+1 meal)

Circle_1.Name: Purify Earth
Circle_1.Description: Earth. This spell removes any impurities or foreign materials preventing soil from  supporting plant life. The magician points at the center of the spell's area of effect and  then makes a Spellcasting test against the earth's Mystic Defense. Soil that is largely  untainted has a Mystic Defense of 6; disease-ridden or poisoned earth resists with the  Mystic Defense of the disease or poison; earth that is Horror-tainted has a Mystic Defense  equal to that of the Horror. If successful, an area of soil is cleansed of impurities  and is again able to sustain plant life.  This spell can be placed in the same spell matrix as Purify Water.   Success Levels: Increase Area (+2 yards).   Extra Threads: Increase Area (+2 yards).

Circle_1.Name: Resist Element
Circle_1.Effect: +3 Physical and Mystic Armor vs. element
Circle_1.Description: Element [Air, Earth, Fire, Water and Wood]. This spell is five different spells that  must each be learned individually. Each allows a character to better handle sudden  and prolonged exposure to the specified element. The magician conjures the element  upon the palm of his hand and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic  Defense. If successful, the element melts away as he touches the target. The target  adds +3 to his Physical and Mystic Armor against element-based damage.  The different elemental versions of this spell can be held in the same spell matrix.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+1 bonus), Additional Target (+Rank)

Circle_1.Name: Shelter
Circle_1.Effect: Creates a suitable shelter for one person
Circle_1.Description: Wood. This spell bends and weaves trees to form a suitable place to sleep for the  night. The magician stands near the desired location of his shelter, visualizes the form  it will take, pantomiming shaping the local flora into the necessary shapes with his  hands, and then makes a Spellcasting (6) test.  If successful, the magician creates the desired shelter suitable for one person per  success. The default shelter is rather crude, but effective. Extra threads may be woven  to make the shelter more inaccessible, such as hidden at the base of a tree, or in the  boughs of trees, increasing the difficulty of any Detection tests by +2 per thread.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+1 Person)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+1 Person), Increase Effect (+2 Detection), Increase  Range (+10 yards)

Circle_1.Name: Snuff
Circle_1.Description: Fire. This spell extinguishes a fire. The magician exhales sharply through his nose,  then waves his hand over the fire and makes a Spellcasting test against the fire's Mystic  Defense (typically 6, if created by a spell, use the Dispel Difficulty). If successful,  the magician makes an Effect test against the fire's Damage Step. If successful, the  Damage Step is reduced by '2 per Success. If not completely extinguished, the fire's  Damage Step increases by +1 per minute to its original intensity.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Area (+2 yards)

Circle_1.Name: Waterproof
Circle_1.Description: Effect: Repels water  Water. This spell seals an inanimate object against water. The magician touches  a finger to oil, runs it along an edge on the target and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If  successful, the target (which must be an inanimate object) cannot get wet. If cast on  an article of clothing, this means water will bead off of it, while if the spell is cast on a  container, it will be sealed until it is next opened when the spell will immediately end.  The target may not be larger than 1 cubic yard.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 minutes), Increase Effect (+1 cubic yard),  Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+Rank)

Circle_1.Name: Dry and Wet
Circle_1.Description: Water. This spell dries soaked items and soaks dry ones; this cannot affect animated or living targets, but can affect the items they're wearing. The spellcaster gathers saliva in their mouth, either swallows (dry) or spits (wet), then makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense (typically 6 for normal objects, or the person if targeting something in their possession). If successful, 10 lbs of goods can be soaked or dried. This can be useful to resist hypothermia, cool off in the heat, remove some evidence of underwater escapades, or embarrass someone terribly at a fancy party where they care about that kind of thing.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (2 lbs)  Extra Threads: Increase Effect (2 lbs), Increase Range (+10 yards)

Circle_1.Name: Ignite
Circle_1.Effect: Elementalist Circle/Physical and -2 to Action test
Circle_1.Description: Fire. This spell sets the target on fire. The spellcaster snaps their fingers and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense (minimum 6). If successful, a small jet of flame hovers over the target and sets it alight. If cast on small flammable objects, such as torches, wooden furniture, or piled wood waiting to be a campfire, the flames resist efforts to extinguish them for one round per success. Against living targets, the target bursts into flame and the Effect test de- termines how much damage is inflicted; damage is only inflicted on the first round. The spellcaster makes an Effect test and the target suffers damage equal to the result and -2 to their Action tests each round.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (+1 round)  Extra Threads: Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Effect (-1 to Action test), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_1.Name: Repair
Circle_1.Effect: +3 to tests to repair the object and reduces the time required.
Circle_1.Description: Earth-Metal. Wood. This spell uses elemental forces to aid in tempo- rarily mending broken objects. The spellcaster touches the target object and imagines it whole, then makes a Spellcasting test against the object's Mystic Defense (minimum 6). If successful, the pieces help organize themselves, are slightly cohesive, and otherwise help the craftsman making repairs. This can make repairs possible that would otherwise be impossible (e.g., fragmented into too many tiny pieces). The craftsman gains +3 to tests to repair the ob- ject and repairs take 10% less time to make. The repairs must be completed within the duration to gain the benefits; if they go longer, there's no longer a reduction in repair time required.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (+1 day)  Extra Threads: Increase Effect (2 to repair tests), Increase Effect (-10% time)

Circle_1.Name: Room Temperature
Circle_1.Effect: Makes a room comfortable, or unbearably hot or cold.
Circle_1.Description: Fire. Water. This spell alters the temperature in a room they are in or adjacent to, making it perfectly comfortable, or just below unbearably hot or cold. Depending on the desired result, the adept sighs contentedly, shivers or wipes sweat from their brow, and makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense of anyone in the room. If successful, the tempera- ture becomes the desired condition. Characters within the affected area don't suffer from the effects of cold or heat exposure (Gamemaster's Guide, p. 194). The spellcaster may end the spell at any time and the temperature returns to normal within one round.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 hours)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 hours), Increase Area (2 yards)

Circle_1.Name: Smoke Cloud
Circle_1.Description: Fire. This spell creates a cloud of smoke that obscures vision. The spell- caster briefly conjures a flame in their palm and exhales deeply into it, mak- ing a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense in the area (mini- mum 6); if everyone in the area is willing, the Difficulty Number is 6. If suc- cessful, the fire belches forth a thick cloud of black smoke, quickly spreading to fill the area. The spellcaster can see and act normally in the smoke, but all others are Harried (Player's Guide, p. 388) and Partially Blind (Player's Guide, p. 387)-this penalty applies to smell and taste-based Action tests as well-from their restricted vision and choking. The smoke cloud remains in place for the duration, though any strong winds act as a Dispel Magic test against the smoke cloud, such as Air Blast (apply the Effect test or Spellcasting test as appropriate at the Gamemas- ter's discretion). A noticeable breeze is Step 4, while a windstorm is Step 12.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (Com- plete Darkness), Increase Area (2 yards), Remove Targets (-rank)

Circle_2.Name: Air Mattress
Circle_2.Description: Air. This spell creates an air bed to promote healing. The magician anchors the  corners of a blanket with something from any one of the four non-air elements'tree  branches, rocks or dirt clods, and the like'then blows into his clenched fist as if inflating  a balloon and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, a cushion of air forms  under the blanket, turning it into a comfortable one-foot-thick mattress. Those who  sleep on the mattress for six hours gain a +2 bonus to the first Recovery test they  make within an hour of waking and are considered to have had sufficient sleep. The  mattress remains inflated for the spell's duration or until the blanket is moved or  damaged.   Success Levels: Additional Target (+1)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 bonus), Increase Effect (-1 hour sleep required,  minimum 4 hours), Additional Target (+Rank)

Circle_2.Name: Fingers of Wind
Circle_2.Description: Air. This spell creates a pair of invisible hands which can lift and manipulate objects.  To observers, a faint breeze seems to move the target item. The magician wiggles  his fingers and makes a Spellcasting (6) test.  If successful, the Dexterity Step is equal to the Effect Step and the hands can lift up  to 10 pounds. The hands can reach anywhere visible to the magician within the spell's  range. While they have a tangible effect when carrying or moving objects, they cannot  be used to attack, nor can they be attacked.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 minutes), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),  Increase Effect (+10 pounds), Increase Range (+10 yards)

Circle_2.Name: Icy Surface
Circle_2.AOE: 60-squard-yard area, no greater than 20 yards in any dimension
Circle_2.Description: Water'Cold. This spell creates a slippery, icy surface that is treacherous to cross.  The magician blows on the surface he wishes to affect and makes a Spellcasting (6)  test. If successful, the target area is immediately covered with ice. The spot the magician  blows on is one edge of the area'the ice extends from this point, to a maximum  size equal to the area of effect. The magician's Effect test determines the Difficulty  Number for crossing the ice without slipping. Characters negotiating the slippery surface  must make a Dexterity or suitable Talent or Skill test (creatures make a Dexterity  or Knockdown test). If successful, they can move across the icy surface at half their  Movement Rate. If failed, they are Knocked Down.  Success Level: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Area (+10 square yards)

Circle_2.Name: Mantle of the Woodland Hunter
Circle_2.Effect: Listen and travel swiftly through the forest to find something
Circle_2.Description: Wood. Binding. This spell summons a wood elemental and temporarily binds it to  a willing target. The magician places one hand on a tree, then his other hand on the  target's forehead and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If  successful, the target's veins and eyes turn green, and he can hear and understand the  slow chatter of wood elementals and spirits within natural areas.  At any time for the duration of the spell, the bound character may declare they are  seeking a living creature. Upon this declaration, the wood spirits will actively begin  aiding the bound character in their search, granting a +5 bonus to any tests which may  apply. Additionally, the character's Movement Rate increases by 4.  Once a bound character is on a hunt, any distraction from that hunt causes this  spell to immediately end. If the spell ends prematurely for any reason, the target's  senses are crippled, suffering a -3 to all Action tests, until he receives a full night's rest,  and this spell may not be cast again for a full day. This spell may only have one active  casting at a time.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 minutes), Increase Effect (+2 to search-related  tests), Increase Effect (+2 Movement Rate)

Circle_2.Name: Shield Willow
Circle_2.Effect: +2 to its Physical and Mystic Defense
Circle_2.Description: Wood. This spell improves the resiliency of shields. The magician joins his fingers  together, then touches the target shield and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful,  the shield sprouts roots and leaves and gains the resiliency of a willow tree, adding  +2 to its Physical and Mystic Defense for the spell's duration.  Success Level: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 minutes), Increase Effect (+1 bonus), Additional  Target (+Rank)

Circle_2.Name: Slow Weapon
Circle_2.Description: Air. This spell slows a weapon, reducing its ability to inflict damage. The magician  mimes a slow-moving attack and then makes a Spellcasting test against the wielder's  Mystic Defense. If successful, the air thickens around the target weapon and it slows  each time it hits an opponent, causing the wielder to suffer a '4 penalty to his Damage  tests. Nothing prevents the wielder from dropping the slowed weapon and swapping  to another if he desires. Anyone picking up and using the weapon suffers the Damage  test penalty until the spell ends.  Success Level: Increase Duration (+2 Rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (-2 Damage penalty), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_2.Name: Balloons of Mist
Circle_2.Effect: Creates six balloons, Movement Rate 6, that can carry up to 200
Circle_2.Description: pounds each. Air. This spell creates misty balloons large enough to lift things. The spellcaster exhales in short bursts and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If suc- cessful, six misty balloons form. The spellcaster controls balloons within the spell's range by concentrating-moving in a direction of their choosing up to their Movement Rate 6. Balloons continue in the same direction and Movement Rate until directed otherwise. The spellcaster must get close enough to balloons that float out of range to regain control. The spellcaster may use coils of mist from the balloons to easily attach willing targets and inanimate objects to the balloons as Standard actions, while unwilling targets cannot be attached-they must be restrained first. Balloons can carry up to 200 pounds and multiple balloons can be attached to carry heavy targets. The balloons are immune to attacks. Once the spell ends, the mist dissipates and the balloons vanish. The spellcaster can only have one active casting of this spell at a time.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Effect (+1 balloon), Increase Effect (2 Movement Rate), Increase Effect (+50 pounds), Increase Range (+10 yards)

Circle_2.Name: Fire Whip
Circle_2.Description: Fire. This spell creates a fiery melee weapon from nothing. The spell- caster makes a whip-cracking motion and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, a flaming whip with a 4-yard range fills their hand at the snap with a loud 'pop,' like a campfire. If the wielder releases the fire whip, it vanishes. The wielder makes Attack tests with either their Melee Weapons or Spellcasting ability against the target's Physical Defense, and makes an Effect test for damage; it's treated as a normal weapon for additional suc- cesses and damage. The fire whip is an entangling weapon (Player's Guide, p. 391) with an Entangling Difficulty equal to the Effect Step. The wielder makes an Effect test each round against entangled targets for damage. At- tacks may also set flammable targets such as dry straw or cloth ablaze, in- flicting normal fire damage (Gamemaster's Guide, p. 170).  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 Ef- fect Step)

Circle_2.Name: Grounding
Circle_2.Effect: +3 Mystic Defense and +3 to Knockdown tests
Circle_2.Description: Earth. This spell connects the willing target to the earth, stabilizing them and grounding magic through it. Both the spellcaster and target must be touching the ground. The spellcaster extends an arm up and points to the sky, then extends their other arm down and points to the ground and makes a Spellcasting (6) test against a willing target. If successful, the target's feet bond with the ground, gaining +3 Mystic Defense, +3 to Knockdown tests, and halving their Movement Rate. Abilities that move or lift the target require an additional success. If the target breaks contact with the ground, this spell ends.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (+1 Mystic Defense and to Knockdown tests), Additional Target (+rank)

Circle_2.Name: Liquid Arrow
Circle_2.Description: Water. This spell forms a missile from a small quantity of water. The spellcaster scoops up a handful of water, hurls it at the target, and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, the liquid transforms into an arrow that strikes the target. The target suffers Physical damage equal to the Effect test result.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (2 Effect Step)  Extra Threads: Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_2.Name: Throne of Air
Circle_2.Effect: Limited flight and 2 to Avoid Blow
Circle_2.Description: tests Air. This spell creates a throne from air. The spellcaster assumes a seated position and makes a Spellcasting (10) test. If successful, the throne forms underneath them, appearing as a wavering, turbulent image. The spellcast- er can move the throne around just above the ground at Movement Rate 12. The spellcaster gains 2 to Avoid Blow tests while seated on the throne. If the spellcaster is unseated from the throne, intentionally or not (this includes, but is not limited to, being knocked down), the spell ends. This spell is incompatible with Winds of Deflection.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Effect (2 Movement Rate), Increase Range (2 yards maximum height)

Circle_3.Name: Ice Mace and Chain
Circle_3.Description: Water'Cold. This spell creates an icy weapon that is thrown at an opponent. The  magician hurls two pebbles, coins, or other objects at the target, then makes a Spellcasting  test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, the objects transform  into frozen spiked mace-heads joined by an icy chain, which wrap around the target.  The magician's Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted. If he rolls any  Bonus Dice on the Damage test, the mace and chain shatter. If the mace and chain  survive the blow, the target is Harried until he frees himself at the end of the following  round.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional  Target (+1)

Circle_3.Name: Lightning Bolt
Circle_3.Description: Air'Electric. This spell strikes the target with bolts of electricity. The magician  raises his hands toward the sky, then points at the target and makes a Spellcasting test  against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, crackling bolts of electricity fly from  the magician's fingers, striking the target. The magician's Effect test determines how  much damage is inflicted.  The initial Spellcasting test is used against any additional targets that may result.  Additional success levels on secondary targets will not cause additional bolts.   Success Levels: Additional Target (+1)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional  Target (+1)

Circle_3.Name: Mantle of the Reflecting Pool
Circle_3.Effect: Grant insight into a target though empathy
Circle_3.Description: Water. Binding. This spell summons a water elemental and temporarily binds it to  a willing target. The magician looks into the target's eyes (or a mirror), touches them  comfortingly, and makes a Spellcasting against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful,  the target's eyes become placid and enticing as strong emotions leave them temporarily.  The bound character may engage others in conversation and adopt their attitude  and mannerisms in a flattering way, giving him a +4 bonus to Conversation tests. For  every success, they may ask a general question regarding the target's attitude and  feelings. The character may make multiple Conversation tests in this way, but for each  subsequent test the Difficulty increases by +5. Subsequent tests may gather more  specific information, though it must be directly relevant to the conversation (GM's  discretion) and if the character fails a Conversation test, the spell ends immediately.  If the bound character expresses any strong opinions or emotions not expressed  by the target first, forcefully manipulates the interaction, or pressures the target, the  spell immediately ends. If the spell ends prematurely for any reason, the bound character  receives a -5 penalty to all Charisma-based tests until he receives a full night's  rest, and this spell may not be cast again for a full day. This spell may only have one  active casting at a time.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 minutes), Increase Effect (+2 to Conversation  tests)

Circle_3.Name: Plant Feast
Circle_3.Description: Wood. This spell converts any kind of plant material into a tasty feast. The spell  requires three intact plants, no matter how scrawny.  The magician cuts or tears the plants into small pieces, then makes a Spellcasting  (6) test. If successful, his Effect test determines the number of meals produced. Each  meal has the following parts: appetizer, soup, salad, bread, entree, vegetable, and dessert.  All of the meals are identical. Although they can appear to contain meat, none  actually do. The meals are as nutritious and tasty as their real counterparts.  The spell only creates types of food that the magician has tasted within the last  year and a day'a good reason for him to occasionally eat fine food to excess. Uneaten  meals vanish when the spell ends.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 hours), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),

Circle_3.Name: Thrive
Circle_3.Description: Wood. This spell accelerates plant growth. The magician sprinkles water on the  ground and makes a Spellcasting (8) test. If successful, plants in the area of effect experience  the equivalent of one week's growth over the remainder of the round. After  the spell ends, their growth rate returns to normal, but the plants do not revert to  their normal size'the effect is permanent. This spell may only be cast a number of  times equal to Spellcasting Rank per day and only once per affected area per week.   Success Levels: Increase Area (+2 yards)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+1 day of growth), Increase Area (+2 yards)

Circle_3.Name: Winds of Deflection
Circle_3.Description: Air. This spell creates a wall of swirling wind strong enough to deflect physical  attacks. The magician makes whooshing noises and makes a Spellcasting test against  his Mystic Defense. If successful, a wave of roiling and surging air surrounds him. The  adept gains a +3 bonus to any Avoid Blow test. This spells allows Avoid Blow to be  used against Blindside and Surprise attacks.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 bonus), Increase Duration (+2 rounds)

Circle_3.Name: Blasting Seeds
Circle_3.Description: Wood. This spell grows explosive seed pods in the area. The spellcaster takes a handful of seeds, rubs them between their hands and blows on them, throws them into the area, and makes a Spellcasting (10) test. If successful, the spellcaster chooses 4 locations on the ground the seeds fly to and pods rapidly grow within the area. The seeds cannot grow in a currently occupied space and each occupies 1-yard radius. There must be at least 4 yards be- tween the edges of these locations. When anyone moves adjacent to a seed pod, it explodes and throws everything adjacent to it directly away from the seed pod. The pod makes an Effect test against the character's Strength Step; they're thrown 2 yards back for each success and this distance is treated as falling damage (see Falling Damage, Gamemaster's Guide, p. 167). Characters thrown at least 2 yards also must resist Knockdown equal to the Effect result. When a seed pod explodes, the spellcaster may regrow the seed pod in the same space as a Simple action if they're within the area. Characters adjacent to a seed pod when it grows don't cause it to ex- plode with their presence. If a character moves no more than 2 yards in a round when adjacent to a seed pod, they don't cause the seed pod to ex- plode. Weaving an extra thread to remove targets means the affected targets won't cause a seed pod to explode, but are still affected by any explosions.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Effect (2 pods), Increase Area (+10 yards), Remove Targets (-rank)

Circle_3.Name: Boil Water
Circle_3.Description: Fire. Water. This spell heats a vessel and quickly brings water to a boil. The spellcaster briskly taps the container and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the vessel heats the water within, bringing a quart of water to boil each round (a gallon of water takes four rounds to boil) up to their Spellcasting rank in quarts of water; there are 32 oz in a quart. Water heated in this fashion imparts healing benefits if used to prepare a soup or tea. Any- one consuming at least 8 oz gains 2 to their next Recovery test within one hour and the amount of time required to make a Recovery test is reduced to 30 minutes. This reduction in time to make a Recovery test isn't cumulative with reductions from other sources. Though not intended to be used in combat, boiling water can be effec- tive against unsuspecting targets within 2 yards. It's awkward at best as a weapon and ineffective against anyone paying attention. Boiling water in- flicts Step 4 damage per quart, up Step 16 maximum. This spell cannot be used to heat water with a living creature inside of it (microscopic organisms don't count), on liquids that aren't primarily water (such as oil), or on water not inside a discrete vessel (such as a hole in the ground to use as a trap). The spellcaster may only have one active casting of this spell at a time.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (+1 quart per turn)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+1 hour), Increase Effect (+1 quart per turn), Increase Effect (+4 quarts total), Increase Effect (2 to Recovery test), Increase Effect (-10 minutes; maximum two threads)

Circle_3.Name: Ice Lance
Circle_3.Effect: +3 to Attack tests with metallic ranged weapons
Circle_3.Description: Water-Cold. This spell creates and hurls a long ice lance at an opponent. Frost forms on the fingers of the spellcaster as they make a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, a five-foot ice spear is formed, trailing frost as it arcs toward and strikes the target. The target is surrounded by a cloud of beautiful, sparkling frost that chills to the bone and ices over their surroundings, halving their movement (round up) until the end of their next turn. The spellcaster's Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (2 Effect Step)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 Ef- fect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1) Lodestone's Touch Threads: 0 Weaving: 7/12 Casting: TMD Range: 20 yards Duration: Rank rounds Area of Effect: 10-yard radius Effect: +3 to Attack tests with metallic ranged weapons Earth-Metal. This spell magnetizes the targets within an area. The spell- caster taps two metal objects together, points at the target, and makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense in the area. If successful, the targets become powerfully magnetized and attracts small, loose iron or steel objects within 2 yards. Any opponents directing metallic missiles or throwing weapons (including arrows with metal arrowheads) at the targets gain +3 to ranged Attack tests.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 to ranged Attack tests), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase Area (2 yards), Remove Targets (-rank)

Circle_3.Name: Porter
Circle_3.Effect: Create a servant to carry things.
Circle_3.Description: Earth. Spirit. Summoning. The spell summons a tasked earth elemental to carry things. The spellcaster spends 30 minutes molding a humanoid shape from an earthen mound, then runs their hand over the figure, and makes a Spellcasting (10) test. If successful, an earth elemental is sum- moned to animate the mound, lifting its body up, and standing upright. The porter travels at Movement Rate 10 with its feet attached to the ground, which ripples under and around it to let it pass. It obeys all the spellcaster's commands to 'halt' or 'follow,' and can understand and carry out simple instructions involving loading and unloading goods. The spellcaster must provide suitable containers (backpacks, sacks, and so on) to hold goods for the porter to carry. The porter can carry 100 pounds and has 10 Physical and Mystic Armor. If it takes any damage, is further from the spellcaster than the spell's range, or separated from the ground, the spell ends. The spellcaster can only have one casting of this spell at a time.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (+1 day)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+1 day), Increase Effect (+50 lbs), Increase Effect (2 Movement Rate), Increase Range (+10 yards)

Circle_3.Name: Puddle Deep
Circle_3.Description: Water. This spell increases the depth of a puddle. The puddle must be a body of water no bigger than the area. The spellcaster sprinkles a bit of water, taps their foot carefully on the ground, and makes a Spellcasting test against the Mystic Defense of anyone standing in, crossing, or passing within 2 yards above the puddle, or Difficulty Number 6 if no one is doing so. If successful, the target puddle becomes 5 yards deep and it splashes up, affecting anyone up to 2 yards above the puddle. Anyone affected sinks and must climb out or risk drowning. While in the puddle, the target is Harried for all actions except escaping. Each round, the target may make a Climbing, Dexterity, or Strength test against the Effect Step. If successful, they escape. Anyone in the puddle when the spell ends finds themselves sitting, wet and bedraggled, in the original pool of water. The excess water in the puddle dis- appears when the spell ends.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Effect (2 Ef- fect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase Area (2 yards)

Circle_4.Name: Air Blast
Circle_4.Description: Air. This spell creates a howling blast of wind. The magician places both hands  to his lips and blows hard, then flings his arms wide and makes a Spellcasting test  against the highest Mystic Defense among anyone within range. If successful, a powerful  blast of air surges away from the magician in a 6-yard wide line in the direction  he is facing. Those caught in the wind's path must make a successful Knockdown test  against the magician's Effect test to avoid being Knocked Down.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase  Area (+2 yards)

Circle_4.Name: Blizzard Sphere
Circle_4.Description: Water'Cold. This spell conjures a small blizzard against foes. The magician shivers  and rubs his shoulders, then cups his hands together as if holding a snowball and  makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense among all targets in the  area of effect. If successful, freezing ice, sleet, and snow fills the sphere, which remains  stationary for the spell's duration.  Movement is halved through the area of effect due to the conditions. Each round,  the magician's Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted on any targets  within the area of effect.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),  Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase Area (+2 yards)

Circle_4.Name: Elemental Spear
Circle_4.Description: Element [Air, Earth, Fire, Water, or Wood]. This spell forms a spear from one of  the elements. There is an Elemental Spear for each element: air, earth, fire, water, and  wood. Each version of the Elemental Spear spell is learned separately, but can be held  in the same spell matrix.  The magician touches some of the desired element and makes a Spellcasting test  against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, a spear is formed from the element,  which hurtles toward the target, striking him. The magician's Effect test determines  how much damage is inflicted. Regardless of the result, the spear dissipates after the  attack.  Each spear provides a different secondary effect.  ' Air spears cause a clap of thunder when they impact the target. The Effect  test is compared to the Mystic Defense of each character within 2 yards of the  target. If successful, all affected characters suffer a -2 penalty to Action tests  until the end of the next round.  ' Earth spears force the target to resist Knockdown against a Difficulty Number  equal to the total damage received after armor.  ' Fire spears deal an additional Step 4/D6 damage die.  ' Water spears heal instead of harm; the target may immediately spend a Recovery  test with a +2 bonus (this may not be affected by other healing aids).  ' Wood spears sprout entangling vines which cause the target to be Harried  until the end of the next round.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds, if applicable), Increase Effect (+2  Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_4.Name: Grove Renewal
Circle_4.Description: Wood. This spell heals the target a small amount each round it is in effect.  The magician holds some dried plant matter in his fingers, blows it away, and  makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, the plant  matter is returned to vibrancy and floats around the target briefly, surrounding them  with a momentary green glow. Either the target or the magician must spend a Recovery  test and the target heals 4 damage each round on their Initiative.  Outside of combat, healing is reduced to 1 damage per round and is not affected  by additional threads.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 damage  healed), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_4.Name: Lightning Step
Circle_4.Effect: +2 to Initiative, Movement Rate and Physical Defense
Circle_4.Description: Air'Electric. This spell electrically charges the target, enhancing his movement.  The magician must be standing under the open sky with wet feet. He rubs his feet  back and forth on the ground, and then makes a Spellcasting test against the target's  Mystic Defense. If successful, coruscating green lightning surrounds the magician's  feet. The target moves around on a sizzling, one-foot-wide lightning bolt that pops  with every step, jumping him around from place to place, and adds +2 to his Initiative,  Movement Rate and Physical Defense for the spell's duration.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+1 to all effects)

Circle_4.Name: Uneven Ground
Circle_4.Description: Earth. This spell makes the ground around the magician shake and move violently.  The magician places his hands on the ground and makes a Spellcasting test that  is compared against each Mystic Defense among any characters in the area of effect.  If successful, the ground lurches suddenly and violently, causing affected targets  to become Harried and their Movement Rate is halved (round down) until they move  out of the area of effect or the spell ends. The magician is not affected by the shaking.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Area (+2 yards), Remove  Targets (-Rank)

Circle_4.Name: Corrode
Circle_4.Effect: Reduces Armor, a shield's Defense bonus, or a weapon's Damage
Circle_4.Description: Step. Water-Acid. This spell rapidly corrodes objects and armor. The spell- caster flings a handful of water at the target and makes a Spellcasting test against the higher of the item's or its bearer's Mystic Defense. If successful, the object quickly corrodes, temporarily inflicting -4 to the target's Armor, shield's Defense bonus, or weapon's Damage Step. Penalties to armor and shields are divided between Physical and Mystic Armor/Defense evenly with extra applied at the spellcaster's discretion. No Armor or Defense Rat- ing, or Damage Step may be lowered below 0. This cannot affect natural at- tacks, including Body Control and Claw Shape. Barriers are affected as armor. The effect of this spell on other objects is determined by the gamemaster.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (-2), In- crease Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_4.Name: Flame Strike
Circle_4.Description: Fire. This spell creates a bolt of intensely bright flame. The spellcaster points with both hands and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, the Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted, reduced by Physical Armor. If the Effect test generates any bonus dice, the target must make a Knockdown test with a Difficulty Number equal to the Effect test result.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (2 Effect Step)  Extra Threads: Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_4.Name: Great Sticky Vines
Circle_4.Description: Wood. This spell allows the spellcaster to control enor- mous vines from their hands. The spellcaster rubs plant juice or sap on both wrists and makes a Spell- casting (6) test. If successful, small plant tendrils sprout from their wrists, leaking sap as they wriggle forth. Each round the spellcaster concentrates on this spell (this is a Standard action), they may ensnare a tar- get within the area by making a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, a vine shoots from their outstretched hand and wraps itself around the target, grappling them (Player's Guide, p. 392). The spellcaster's Effect Step is the Grappling Difficulty. The spellcaster must concentrate to maintain grapples and can maintain grapples up to their total targets (each target beyond the first requires an Extra Thread), but can end a grapple at any time and attempt to grapple a different target. If the spellcaster stops concentrating, all grapples immediately end. The vines may drag ensnared objects and grappled targets (up to Effect Step x 20 pounds) toward them at Movement Rate 6. To resist, the target must make a successful Strength test against the Effect Step-this is in- dependent of any attempts to break free of the vines holding them. The vines have Physical and Mystic Defense equal to the Effect Step and any damage by an edged weapon (including claws) or fire immediately severs them; other sources must cause at least 5 damage. Howev- er, the spellcaster can simply drop a severed vine and shoot out a new one.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (+50 lbs)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), In- crease Effect (+50 lbs), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_4.Name: Ice Barrier
Circle_4.Description: Water-Cold. This spell creates a half-circle of ice for protection. The spellcaster throws a handful of water where they want the barrier to appear and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the ice freezes into an unmoving barrier which protects whoever is inside from attacks in a half-circle (three horizontal directions on a hex-grid). The barrier is clear and prevents other spells from passing through it on both sides as any other solid object. It has a Death Rating of 30; excess damage beyond the Death Rating has no effect. Most spellcasters use this to protect themselves from being attacked from behind or to create an area of temporary reprieve to heal a fallen ally.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (+10 Death Rating)

Circle_4.Name: Inflame
Circle_4.Effect: +3 to unarmed Damage and Fireblood tests
Circle_4.Description: Fire. This spell engulfs a willing target in a sheet of flame. The spell- caster clicks their fingers and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the target is enveloped in a thin layer of fire. The target gains +3 to Damage tests made with body parts (e.g. a Beastmaster using Claw Shape or a Sky Raider with Swift Kick benefits, but a t'skrang using a weapon with their tail doesn't). Additionally, Fireblood tests gain +3.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (+1 to affected tests), Additional Target (+rank)

Circle_4.Name: Ironwood
Circle_4.Description: Wood. This spell makes ordinary wood much harder and more durable. The spell affects living wood or wooden items up to a 4-yard radius. The spellcaster taps the wood nine times with a piece of iron or steel, the last tap giving off a metallic ringing sound, and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the wood becomes much stronger, able to withstand greater stress and pressure than ordinary wood. Wooden weapons and shields be- come like their metal equivalents but retain their normal weight and Initia- tive Penalty; any penalties incurred for being a wooden version of the typ- ically metal item (e.g., a sharpened wooden sword) are ignored for the du- ration. Wooden walls or doors have Physical Armor 20 and Death Rating of 85 (Gamemaster's Guide, p. 165). When cast on living wood, the spell doesn't interfere with the plant's biological processes and it continues to grow nor- mally. When cast on an adept using Wood Skin or wearing wooden/plant- based armor (including fernweave and similar), the target gains 2 Physical Armor. If an adept is wearing affected armor and using Wood Skin, this bo- nus doesn't stack (as usual). If the talent wears off before the duration of the spell, subsequent uses of the talent benefit until the spell's duration ends.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 hours)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 hours), Increase Effect (Barrier: +5 Physical Armor, 20 Death Rating), Increase Effect (Wood Skin: 2 Physi- cal Armor), Increase Area (2 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_5.Name: Earth Staff
Circle_5.Description: Earth. This spell creates a quarterstaff from a handful of earth or a piece of stone,  or emerging directly from the earth. The magician touches the material and then  makes a Spellcasting test. If successful, a five-foot-long quarterstaff (with all equivalent  attributes) is formed that can be used as a melee weapon in combat. The appearance  of each earth staff is unique to the Elementalist and will change as he increases  in Circle (generally becoming more distinctive and ornate). While the Earth Staff is  in hand, all successfully cast Elementalism spells are treated as though they have an  additional success. Only those with knowledge of Elementalism may wield the earth  staff. If a character without Elementalism wields an earth staff in combat, the spell  ends as soon as the staff is used, causing no effects, and reverting back to its original  components.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 minutes), Increase Weapon Damage (+2  Steps)

Circle_5.Name: Fireball
Circle_5.Description: Fire. This spell creates an explosive ball of flame.  The magician conjures a small flame and places one of his hands to the side of the  fire, waving it in a circular motion over the top of the flame, then makes a Spellcasting  test against the highest Mystic Defense among all targets within a 4-yard radius of the  point of impact. If successful, a small globe of fire erupts from his hand, which quickly  expands to the size of a beach ball, before exploding in an intense gout of flame at the  point of impact. The magician's Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted  on those affected. Those affected are also Partially Blind (-2 penalty to Actions) until  the end of the next round.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase  Area (+2 yards), Remove Targets (-Rank)

Circle_5.Name: Heat Armor
Circle_5.Description: Fire. This spell rapidly heats up armor or shields. The magician rubs his hands  together and makes a Spellcasting test against the wearer's Mystic Defense. If successful,  the armor quickly heats to an extreme temperature. Each round, the magician's  Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted on those wearing or touching  the armor (the wearer receives no protection from the armor affected by this spell).   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),  Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_5.Name: Nutritious Earth
Circle_5.Description: Earth. This spell uses Blood Magic to enhance the rate at which land grows food.  The magician pricks his hand with a sharp object and lets a drop of blood fall on the  earth, taking 1 Blood Magic Damage (this damage can be healed after the spell ends),  then makes a Spellcasting test against the ground's Mystic Defense (usually 6). If successful,  an area of soil up to 100 yards in radius is enriched by magic, making the land  especially fertile for a year and a day. Plants grow in this soil at roughly double their  normal rate'the gamemaster determines the exact effects of this growth.  Many kaers survived the Scourge by using this spell and it enabled many towns  rebuilt in areas prone to bad weather to thrive on the surface. Rumor has it that questors  of Jaspree from the town of Trosk are attempting to heal the Badlands through  liberal use of the Nutritious Earth spell.   Success Levels: Increase Area (+10 yards)   Extra Threads: Increase Area (+10 yards)

Circle_5.Name: Ride the Lightning
Circle_5.Description: Air ' Electric. This spell transports the magician to any location he can see within  range. The magician's current location and destination both must be open to the sky.  The magician points to his destination with one hand, then points to the sky  with his other and makes a Spellcasting test against his Mystic Defense. If successful,  lighting strikes him and the destination simultaneously, leaving a mark on the ground  unique to the magician in each location. The magician is immediately transported to  the destination. If the magician gets one success, he is disoriented and cannot act  during the next round. On two successes, he may act normally on the following round.  With three successes, he may immediately act as though he has not taken any actions  yet this round. If the Spellcasting test fails, the magician is struck by lightning for  WIL+6/Physical damage. Each additional use of this spell on the same day has a cumulative  +5 modifier to the Casting Difficulty.   Success Levels: See text.   Extra Threads: Increase Range (+2 miles)

Circle_5.Name: Shattering Stone
Circle_5.Description: Earth. This spell turns an ordinary stone into an explosive missile. The magician  picks up a fist-sized stone, then throws it at the target and makes a Spellcasting test  against the highest Mystic Defense of any character within the area of effect. If successful,  the stone explodes into sharp fragments that scatter in all directions. The  magician compares his Spellcasting test against the Mystic Defense of all characters  within the area of effect. The Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted on  each target, and all targets must make a Knockdown test against the damage taken.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase  Area (+2 yards)

Circle_5.Name: Air Sentry
Circle_5.Description: Air. Spirit. Summoning. This spell summons an air elemental as a sen- try for the area. The spellcaster sits in the approximate middle of the area, weaving threads, blows into their hands, and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, their breath swirls to life as the air elemental manifests before them. The spellcaster tells the air sentry the area to watch-if it's smaller than the maximum area (e.g. a room or not beyond a stream)-the alarm's nature, and indicates anyone exempt from its scrutiny. Air sentries can watch secretly from astral space and report to the spellcaster when they return or raise an alarm. The alarm's nature can be nearly any audible sound, such as a particular bird call, warning klaxons, a popular tune, or the sound of two men heckling an imagined frog and bear show. Regardless of the exact nature, it doesn't convincingly serve a second purpose and is loud enough for the spellcaster to hear if they're within the area. Air sentries use the Effect test as an Awareness or Astral Sight test to detect things within 10 yards of the area they are guarding. They automatically detect anything crossing the established perimeter if the Effect Step is greater than or equal to the intruder's Mystic Defense.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 hours)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 hours), Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Area (2 yards)

Circle_5.Name: Fuel Flame
Circle_5.Effect: Increases the effect of fire abilities.
Circle_5.Description: Fire. This spell opens a momentary, one-directional rift from the astral realm of fire and the magical essence lingers in the area, increasing the in- tensity of fires and fire-based abilities used in the area. The spellcaster con- jures an ember in their hand, blows on it, and makes a Spellcasting (10) test. If successful, it turns into a burning crack that opens into the rift. Existing fires gain 2 to their Damage Step (Gamemaster's Guide, p. 170) as the influ- ence of the astral realm of fire causes them to swell; this includes ongoing spells such as Flame Flash (Player's Guide, p. 344). Any fire-based abilities gain 2 to appropriate Action, Damage, and Effect tests, such as Fireblood tests, spells with the Fire keyword, appropriate fire spirit powers (e.g. fire- based Elemental Aura or Engulf), etc. Effects must originate within the area to gain the benefit. For example, a Fireball spell must be cast from within the area to benefit.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 to bonuses), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase Area (2 yards)

Circle_5.Name: Root Trap
Circle_5.Effect: Anyone in the area is Harried and -4 Movement Rate
Circle_5.Description: Wood. This spell creates a living trap out of plant roots. The spellcaster points at the ground in the target area and makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense in the area (minimum 6). If successful, the plant roots become animated and grow extensively, breaking through the stone and soil, grappling and harassing anyone in the area. Anyone in the area is Harried and suffers -4 Movement Rate; these penalties end when they leave the area. If a target's Movement Rate is reduced to 0 in the area, they're grappled by the roots (Player's Guide, p. 391) with a Grappling Difficulty of 10.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (-2 Movement Rate)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (-2 Movement Rate), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase Area (2 yards), Re- move Targets (-rank)

Circle_5.Name: Stone Cage
Circle_5.Effect: Traps target in a cage of stone
Circle_5.Description: Earth. This spell traps a target in an earthen or stone cage. The target must be standing on earth or stone and must be smaller in size than the area. The spellcaster spreads their fingers wide, locks them together (repre- senting the bars closing), and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, the surface they're standing on forms a cage up to the area in size, trapping them inside. The cage is a barrier with Phys- ical Armor 12 and Death Rating 45 (Gamemaster's Guide, p. 165). When the spell ends or is destroyed, it immediately crumbles apart and frees the tar- get.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (2 Physical Armor, +10 Death Rating)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Duration (min- utes), Increase Effect (2 Physical Armor, +10 Death Rating), Increase Area (2 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_5.Name: Suffocating Paste
Circle_5.Description: Water. This spell creates a blob of greenish-yellow paste which blinds or suffocates whoever it is thrown at. The spellcaster sniffs loudly then spits into their hand, hurling the contents at the target, and making a Spellcast- ing test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, the paste covers the part of the body which the target uses to breathe (usually the head), smothering them and causing Step 4/D6 suffocation damage each round. The target is also Harried and their Movement Rate is halved. If the area struck by the paste also contains the target's sensory organs (usually the eyes), they're partially blinded as well and suffer a Partial Darkness penalty. Targets that don't require vision to 'see' are still affected-the paste is thick enough to inhibit the effectiveness of their sensory organs. The paste ad- heres tightly and isn't easily removed. The paste is removed by a successful Strength test against the Effect Step made by anyone.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 Ef- fect Step), Increase Effect (+1 Damage Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_5.Name: Without a Trace
Circle_5.Effect: No movement penalty and 2 Tracking Difficulty
Circle_5.Description: Wood. This spell eases the willing target's passage through natural areas. The spellcaster plucks leaves from the plants and some detritus from the ground, rubs their hands together, crushing them, and makes a Spellcast- ing (6) test. If successful, the target doesn't disturb and isn't hindered by the foliage, undergrowth, and other plants when moving through the area. Their Movement Rate isn't reduced by these features when moving through them-though can still be reduced by other effects. The Difficulty Number to track them also increases by 2 while in an affected area.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Effect (2 Dif- ficulty), Additional Target (+rank)

Circle_6.Name: Drastic Temperature
Circle_6.Description: Fire or Water'Cold. This spell causes a radical change in ambient temperature.  The magician wraps his arms about himself and shivers as if cold, then points toward  the spot where the effect will be centered and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful,  the temperature inside the area of effect rises to extreme hot or cold, causing  water to either boil or freeze (as appropriate), at the magician's discretion. The  temperature change takes thirty seconds to reach the final temperature, after which  each round that a character is caught in or passes through the sphere of effect, the  magician's Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted. Once the spell has  been cast, the sphere of effect cannot be moved. This spell is commonly used to create  a barrier to discourage others from passing a given point.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 minutes), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),  Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase Area (+2 yards)

Circle_6.Name: Fireweave
Circle_6.Description: Fire. This spell creates a protective cloak of flames. The magician makes stitching  motions, then touches the target and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's  Mystic Defense. If successful, a cloak of fire wraps around the target. Anyone attacking  the wearer in close combat suffers damage each round from the intense heat thrown  off by the cloak. The wearer makes an Effect test to determine how much damage is  inflicted. The cloak's heat does not affect the wearer.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_6.Name: Mantle of the Fire Marauder
Circle_6.Description: Fire. Binding. This spell summons a fire elemental and temporarily binds it to a  willing target. The magician showers the target in sparks, then touches the target and  makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, the target  will bellow in rage and be engulfed in flame. Anyone engaging the target in close combat  automatically takes Effect test damage (Physical Armor protects).  The target's Damage tests add a bonus dice of fire damage equal to the Effect Step.  Each round, the target must use the Aggressive Attack option (even if not normally  allowed, such as when using ranged weapons), though this does not cost Strain. The  target must either attack, or move their full movement toward their next opponent  with every intention of attacking that opponent. Failure to do either of these causes  the fire elemental to forcefully leave the target, dealing Effect Step +2 damage to the  target (no armor protects).  Any attempt to fool the elemental by not engaging an opponent in combat will  cause the spell to immediately end as previously described. This spell may only have  one active casting at a time and is incompatible with the Flameweapon and Fireweave  spells. The magician may choose to reduce the Effect Step of the spell at the time of  casting.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)

Circle_6.Name: Metal Wings
Circle_6.Effect: Flight; +6 bonus to Strength for lifting
Circle_6.Description: Earth'Metal. This spell creates shiny metal wings, which sprout forth from a  character's shoulders, allowing him to fly. The magician touches the shoulder of the  target, then spreads his arms wide and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's  Mystic Defense. If successful, gleaming silver metal wings appear on the target's back.  The wings allow him to fly at a Movement Rate of 12.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 minutes), Increase Effect (+2 Strength bonus),  Increase Effect (+2 Movement Rate), Additional Target (+Rank)

Circle_6.Name: Stone Rain
Circle_6.Description: Earth. This spell showers fist-sized stones from the sky. The magician points at  where the stones will fall and makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic  Defense among any characters within the area of effect. If successful, affected targets  are struck by falling stones. The magician's Effect test determines how much damage  is inflicted. Each round, more stones rain down on the targets, who continue to take  damage as long as they remain within the area of effect. Anyone that takes damage  from this spell must make a Knockdown test against the damage taken. Movement  Rates in the area of effect are halved.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),  Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase Area (+2 yards)

Circle_6.Name: Tossing Earth
Circle_6.Description: Earth. This spell tosses those standing on an area of earth or stone wildly into the  air. The magician makes loud noises as he hurls pebbles, dirt, or small stones on the  ground, then makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the area of effect becomes explosive  when touched. The magician makes an Effect test. Each round, anyone moving  through the area of effect makes a Willpower test against the test result. If successful,  the character can move and act normally. If failed, the earth or stone beneath the character  explodes, throwing him Step 5/D8 yards into the air, inflicting falling damage  based on the height fallen (see the Gamemaster's Guide). The area remains volatile  until the spell ends.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 hours)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 hours), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),  Increase Effect (+2 Step distance), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase Area (+2  yards)

Circle_6.Name: Bones of the Earth
Circle_6.Description: Earth. This spell reveals the contours of the earth in the surrounding area. The spellcaster closes their eyes, places both hands on the ground, inhales deeply, and makes a Spellcasting (10) test. If successful, the spell- caster expands their awareness for the duration to understand the topog- raphy of the area, which requires their concentration for one minute. If they're interrupted, the knowledge is lost and the spell must be cast again. This awareness also reveals where the earth comes in contact with other elements (e.g. soil underneath the water, a tree in the soil, a cave within the earth, a fire pit, but not changes in temperature), but doesn't reveal any de- tails about features of other elements. This doesn't reveal the presence of creatures, undead, spirits (including elementals), etc., even if they're wear- ing stone shoes (for example). The Spellcasting result is compared against any features in the area with a Mystic Defense greater than 10. If successful, they're revealed as normal. If failed, they aren't revealed as appropriate. For example, a kaer doesn't show up as empty space and the entrance appears as unremarkable earth.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Area (+50 yards)

Circle_6.Name: Dust Devil
Circle_6.Description: Air. Earth. This spell conjures a whirling dust storm, blurring and irri- tating those caught in it. The spellcaster throws a handful of dust into the air and makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense within the area (minimum 6). If successful, a dust storm billows outward from the spellcaster, enveloping the area. Those within the dust storm are Harried and must make a Knockdown test against the Effect Step. The spellcaster may concentrate (Standard action) to move the dust devil up to 10 yards from its location.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 Ef- fect Step), Increase Effect (-2 to Action tests), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase Area (2 yards), Remove Targets (-rank)

Circle_6.Name: Flame Darts
Circle_6.Description: Fire. This spell creates up to five fiery darts that are hurled at oppo- nents. The spellcaster cups their hands together to hold the darts, flings them at up to five targets, and makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense among the targets. If successful, the darts set fire to the targets for two rounds and the Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted on each target each round. Not all darts must be used, but each dart must have a different target. The fire cannot be extinguished for the dura- tion.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (2 Effect Step)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 Ef- fect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (2)

Circle_6.Name: Flameshaw
Circle_6.Description: Fire. Spirit. Summoning. This spell conjures a hulking fire spirit from a large fire, like a campfire, to cart the spellcaster from place to place. The spellcaster makes pulling motions, as if tugging at the leads of an animal, and makes a Spellcasting (10) test. If successful, a fiery spirit is summoned from the flames, appearing at the spellcaster's side. The back half of the spirit appears in the shape of a two-person rickshaw pulled by the spirit's front legs and torso. The spellcaster and a passenger may ride in the rick- shaw, unharmed by the flames, although the ride is a warm one. The spirit only responds to verbal commands given to it by the spellcaster within range in the language of fire (Elemental Tongues, Player's Guide, p. 141); using Elemental Tongues is a Standard Action. This use of the talent doesn't cost Strain. The flameshaw has wheels, but doesn't touch the ground. Instead, it travels at least a few inches above the ground and may rise up to 100 yards, climbing the same distance vertically as it travels horizontally. It has Move- ment Rate 14. Passengers receive Partial Cover (Player's Guide, p. 386), but no additional protection from the flameshaw. The flameshaw may be com- manded to run over a target, trampling them under its fiery wheels, by mak- ing an Elemental Tongues test as an Attack test against the target's Physical Defense. If successful, the Effect test determines how much fire damage is inflicted, reduced by Physical Armor. Additional successes on the Elemental Tongues test can give 2 to the Effect test and/or be used with the Overrun special maneuver (Gamemaster's Guide, p. 252). Use the spellcaster's Ele- mentalist Circle for the Strength Step. The flameshaw's Physical and Mystic Defense are 10 and it's unaffected by abilities that target Social Defense. If the flameshaw is successfully at- tacked with a water effect, the spell ends and it immediately vanishes. The spellcaster may only have one active casting of this spell.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (+10 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+10 minutes), Increase Effect (2 to flameshaw's Defenses), Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Effect (2 Movement Rate), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase Range (+10 yards to maximum altitude)

Circle_6.Name: Liquid Eyes
Circle_6.Description: Water. This spell directs a blinding gel at a target's eyes. The spellcaster performs a gesture as if they're wiping tears from their eyes and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, the tar- get's eyes fill with an opaque gel almost impossible to remove, and they suf- fer Full Darkness penalties. Each round, the target may make a Willpower test against the Effect Step as a Free action. If successful, the gel clears from their eyes and the spell ends. Targets who don't have eyes are unaffected by this spell.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 Ef- fect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Targets (+1)

Circle_6.Name: Living Wall
Circle_6.Effect: Creates a physical and astral wall of plants
Circle_6.Description: Wood. This spell creates a barrier of living plants and thorny vines. The spellcaster cuts a line in the earth, touches the ground, and makes a Spell- casting (6) test. If successful, a wall of plants and thorny vines sprouts from the line, up to the area. The barrier inhibits physical and astral passage with Physical and Mystic Armor 5 and Death Rating 20 for each 2-yard sec- tion. Damage equal to or in excess of the wall's Death Rating allows egress through the wall for one character that round, before the plants grow to cov- er the gap, healing all damage at the end of the round whether the opening is used or not. Any character trying to push their way through a gap in the wall suffers Step 4/D6 damage from the sharp thorns and branches (no ar- mor provides protection).  Success Levels: Increase Effect (+5 to Death Rating)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Duration (hours), Increase Effect (+5 Death Rating), Increase Effect (2 Damage Step), Increase Area (2 yards tall), Increase Area (+10 yards wide)

Circle_7.Name: Cloud Summon
Circle_7.Description: Air. This spell summons cloud cover as a precursor to casting another spell, such  as Death Rain (p. 289), or simply to achieve impressive weather effects. The magician  makes gestures mimicking the swirling pattern of rapidly-moving clouds, then tosses  some water into the air and makes a Spellcasting test against a Difficulty Number  determined by the cloud type. Summoning normal clouds carries a Casting Difficulty  of 8; stormy weather carries a Casting Difficulty of 13; gale-force storms carry a Casting  Difficulty of 20 (or more, at the gamemaster's discretion). If successful, the water  billows into a wispy fragment of cloud, rising rapidly into the sky where it acts as a  beacon drawing other clouds to it.  Under normal circumstances, the clouds summoned take one hour to arrive'  storm clouds may take longer to gather. The magician makes an Effect test, subtracting  the test Result in minutes from the clouds' arrival time. The spell may be cast multiple  times to hasten the clouds' arrival. The effect centers on the magician's position  at the time of his first casting'it does not move with the magician. The range also  determines the radius of ground area covered by the clouds. The magician can summon  any type of natural cloud formations he has witnessed or experienced. If he has  not been outside during a storm, he cannot summon that type of weather.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 hours), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)

Circle_7.Name: Death Rain
Circle_7.Description: Water'Acid. This spell causes acid rain to fall from the sky. It requires cloud cover,  either natural or produced by magic, such as the Cloud Summon spell, p.288. The  magician calls out the Names of those friendly to him, then compares his Spellcasting  test against the Mystic Defense of each un-Named target within the area of effect. If  successful, corrosive rain falls from the clouds onto the target.  Each round of exposure to the acid causes Step 8/2D6 damage to the target. The  magician is unaffected, as are those whose Names were shouted when the spell was  cast. If the magician chooses to concentrate, the acid's intensity increases and he adds  his Willpower Step to the rain's Damage test that round. Once he breaks concentration,  he cannot regain it again without recasting the spell. Even if the magician loses  concentration, the spell continues until it ends. Should the magician move, the area of  effect remains stationary.  Success Level: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Area (+2-yard radius)

Circle_7.Name: Earth Surfing
Circle_7.Description: Earth. This spell creates a wave of earth that hastens travel. The magician must  be standing on earth or rock, then kneels down and moves his hands over the ground  and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the area of ground on which he is  standing becomes a wave of soil he can ride with a Movement Rate of 16 through  areas without significant obstacles (boulders, trees, houses, etc). Encountering an obstacle  will immediately end the spell (GM's discretion).   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+1 hour)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+1 hour), Increase Effect (+2 Movement  Rate), Increase Area (+2 yards)

Circle_7.Name: Mantle of the Blood Elf
Circle_7.Effect: Ignore Wound penalties and create temporary obstructions for a price
Circle_7.Description: paid in blood  Wood. Binding. This spell summons a wood elemental and temporarily binds it to  a willing target. The magician stabs the target with a thorn and makes a Spellcasting  test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, thorns erupt from the target's  flesh and they immediately suffer a wound. However, the target is immune to Wound  penalties for the duration of the spell. Consequently, many Horrors will ignore them  for this time.  The target may spend up to their Willpower Step in Strain to grow a number of 2  yard by 2 yard sections of brambles within 10 yards equal to amount of Strain spent.  The brambles are fed on the target's blood and quickly grow from the ground, hungry  for more blood. Any character, except for the bound character, who comes in contact  with the brambles takes Step 4 damage; no armor protects against this damage.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Damage Steps), Increase Range (from touch  to 10 yards)

Circle_7.Name: Thunderclap
Circle_7.Effect: '6 penalty to Action tests; causes deafness
Circle_7.Description: Air. This spell creates a loud clap of thunder that stuns and deafens those hearing  it. The magician claps his hands and compares his Spellcasting test against the Mystic  Defense of each character, friend or foe, within the area of effect.  If successful, the target suffers a '6 penalty to his Action tests until the end of the  following round and is deafened for a further Step 6 rounds, during which he suffers  a '6 penalty to his hearing-based Perception tests. Most unintelligent creatures flee  in fear of the sound.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (-2 penalty), Increase  Range (+2 yards), Remove Targets (-Rank)

Circle_7.Name: Whirlwind
Circle_7.Description: Air. This spell creates a spinning turbulent column of air. The magician makes  whirling motions with his fingers and then makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful,  he forms a swirling pillar of wind, 4 yards high, which spins wildly around him. Each  round, the magician may concentrate to direct the whirlwind against one character  in range. The magician makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense  among all characters in the area of effect. If successful, his Effect test determines how  much damage is inflicted. All targets in the area of effect are Harried. If the magician  ceases to concentrate, the wind dissipates and the spell ends.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase  Area (+2 yards), Remove Targets (-Rank)

Circle_7.Name: Engulf [Element]
Circle_7.Description: Element [Air, Earth, Fire, Water, or Wood]. This spell envelops and smoth- ers the target in an element. Each version of the Engulf [Element] spell is learned separately, one for each element: air, earth, fire, water, and wood, but can be held in the same spell matrix. To encase the target in an element requires the spellcaster to touch that element, or be exposed in the case of fire (not enough to cause damage). The spellcaster makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, the target is Harried, their Movement Rate is halved, and the spellcaster makes an Effect test each round to determine how much damage is inflicted on the target. The spellcaster must concentrate to ensure the tar- get remains engulfed by the element-if their concentration is broken, the spell ends. Air-Anyone adjacent to the target makes a Knockdown test against a Difficulty Number equal to the Effect Step each round. Earth-The target makes a Knockdown test against a Difficulty Number equal to the total damage after armor or the Effect Step (whichever is high- er) each round. Fire-Anyone adjacent to the target also takes the Effect damage, re- duced by Physical Armor. Water-Anyone adjacent to the target is Harried.
