Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 hours)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 hours), Increase Effect (+2 Movement  Rate), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+Rank)

Circle_1.Name: Speed Reading
Circle_1.Effect: Gives the target a +4 bonus to all Research tests
Circle_1.Description: This spell allows an adept to read at an incredible speed and provides perfect  recall of that information. The magician closes his eyes and exhales slowly, and then  makes a Spellcasting test against his Mystic Defense.  If successful, an intense concentration comes over him, such that he has a -5 to  all Perception tests related to noticing anything outside of his focus. However, he also  gains the ability to read one page a second and can recall all of that information without  error for the duration of this spell. This grants the target a +4 bonus to any Research  tests and can increase the frequency of Research tests (GM discretion).   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 hours)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 hours), Increase Effect (+2 to Research  tests)

Circle_1.Name: Wall Walker
Circle_1.Description: This spell improves a character’s climbing ability. The magician crouches down  on all fours, then touches the target and makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s  Mystic Defense. If successful, the target gains a +4 Climbing test bonus.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 minutes), Increase Effect (+2 bonus), Additional  Target (+Rank), Increase Range (+10 yards)

Circle_1.Name: Perimeter Alarm
Circle_1.Description: This spell creates an alarm that alerts if there's activity within the area. The spellcaster walks the perimeter of the area, stands in the center, and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the area glows red briefly and sounds twice to indicate it's armed. When someone or something crosses this zone, the Effect Step is compared against the trespasser's Mystic De- fense. If successful, the trespasser is detected and the spell sounds an alert audible to every character within the perimeter, including the intruder. Those outside the perimeter hear nothing. The spellcaster may freely pass the area defined by the spell without setting it off, as may characters standing in the area when the spell was cast. The spellcaster may also define the minimum and maximum size of creature the alarm reacts to at the time of casting, ensuring the alarm isn't acciden- tally set off by the normal activities of local fauna. This spell may be ended by the caster at any time.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 hours)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 hours), Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Area (2 yards)

Circle_1.Name: Seal
Circle_1.Description: Lock. This spell magically closes and locks a door, window, gate, or sealable container. The spellcaster taps the target once for each thread and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the target door, gate, window, or container shuts and remains closed for the spell's duration. The Effect Step is the Difficulty Number for Strength tests to open the sealed object. The Lock Picking talent can be used to dispel this effect. This spell cannot be cast on empty doorways or gateways - its use requires an actual door or con- tainer lid.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 hours)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 hours), Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_1.Name: Travelog
Circle_1.Description: This spell records the spellcaster's experiences and/or dictations. The spellcaster writes their Name on the intended record for this spell (e.g. a book, folio, scroll, etc.) with their finger and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, they choose which of the two records they wish to have docu- mented: dictation or experiences. Dictation must be preceded and closed by an indication to begin and stop recording, such as 'Scribe' and 'Stop.' Expe- riences are recorded in the third person as though by someone with a wry sense of humor who doesn't necessarily think highly of the spellcaster. This method is unpopular with Wizards who openly wonder why it even exists. The indicated record must be within the area from the spellcaster to have information entered with this spell. The report is magically entered in the selected record using a medium of their choosing (e.g. chalk, charcoal, ink, etc.) in the spellcaster's handwriting.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 hours)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 hours), Increase Area (2 yards)

Circle_1.Name: Triangulate
Circle_1.Description: This spell determines the exact distance between the spellcaster and a target within line of sight. The spellcaster extends two fingers on each hand into a 'V,' crosses them in front of an eye to form a triangle they view a dis- tant target though, and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, they can use the Triangulate effect as a Standard action. To do this, the spellcaster makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense (minimum 6). If successful, they determine the distance to the target in yards.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Area (+10- yard radius)

Circle_1.Name: Volume Control
Circle_1.Effect: Sets alarm for a specified time
Circle_1.Description: This spell amplifies or reduces the volume of the target's voice. The spellcaster clears their throat, gently strokes their vocal cords, and makes a Spellcasting (6) test if the target is willing, or the target's Mystic Defense (minimum 6) if the target is unwilling (this includes unaware). If success- ful, the spellcaster chooses to increase or reduce the volume of the target's voice. Increasing the volume allows the target to be understood clearly over loud noise, such as the din of a busy market or party, and from farther away. However, even attempting the quietest whisper is nearly impossible and is the volume of normal conversation for the target. Decreasing the volume makes it difficult to hear the target at all. They can yell no louder than normal conversation and are easily drowned out by white noise.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1) Wake-Up Call Threads: 1 Weaving: 5/10 Casting: 6 Range: Touch Duration: Up to 24 hours Effect: Sets alarm for a specified time This spell is particularly popular with guards and anyone standing watch. It helps a willing target to sleep and wakes them up at a specified time. The spellcaster speaks a command word to the target, imitates the clanging of a bell, touches a willing target, and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the spellcaster determines when the alarm goes off and wheth- er the alarm noise (clanging bells) is audible to the target only or everyone within earshot. The target falls into a restful slumber and wakes immediate- ly, completely alert when the alarm goes off or if the command word is spo- ken. This doesn't prevent the sleeper from waking to external stimuli which would normally wake them (e.g. the din of battle). Additional successes re- duce the amount of time the target requires to receive a full rest (minimum four hours).  Success Levels: Increase Effect (-1 hour)  Extra Threads: Additional Target (+rank)

Circle_2.Name: Astral Shield
Circle_2.Description: This spell enhances a character’s resistance to magic. The magician makes a  warding symbol with his hand, pointing at the target, and makes a Spellcasting test  against the target’s Mystic Defense. Characters that have been astrally sensed (see pg.  209) may be included as additional targets. Each target added in this way adds +1 to  the Casting Difficulty. If successful, the target adds +2 to his Mystic Defense.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (minutes), Increase Effect (+2 Mystic Defense),  Increase Range (+10 yards)

Circle_2.Name: Baseline Subtraction
Circle_2.Effect: Eliminate the penalties of Astral Interference
Circle_2.Description: This spell eliminates the penalties caused by the Astral Interference talent by isolating  the “noise” and reducing it based on the rest of astral space in the area. The magician  holds both hands at waist level and sweeps one up in a steep motion, bringing it  back down to his other hand, then makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic  Defense. Characters which have been astrally sensed (see pg. 209) may be included  as additional targets, increasing the Difficulty by +1 each. If successful, the penalties  caused by Astral Interference are eliminated.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Range (+10 yards)

Circle_2.Name: Crushing Will
Circle_2.Effect: WIL+3/Mystic and a -2 penalty to target’s Mystic Defense
Circle_2.Description: This spell directly attacks a character’s will. The magician furrows his brows and  peers at the target, then makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic Defense.  If successful, the Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted once. Additionally,  the target suffers a -2 penalty to their Mystic Defense until the end of the next  round.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Effect (-2 to Mystic Defense),  Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_2.Name: Dodge Boost
Circle_2.Description: This spell improves a character’s ability to dodge attacks in combat. The magician  sways sideways, then makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic Defense. If  successful, the target gains a +2 bonus to his Avoid Blow tests.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (minutes), Increase Effect (+2 bonus), Increase  Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+Rank)

Circle_2.Name: Rope Ladder
Circle_2.Description: This spell creates a ladder out of a length of rope. The magician uncoils the rope,  then makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the rope moves at a Movement Rate of  10 to a location of the magician’s choosing within the area of effect. The magician cannot  control the rope with precision—it cannot tie itself off on the bars of a window,  for example. The rope simply moves directly from point A to point B. Those climbing  the rope gain a +4 bonus to their Climbing tests. The rope can hold a maximum weight  of 600 pounds.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 minutes), Increase Area (+10 yards)

Circle_2.Name: Seeking Sight
Circle_2.Description: This spell heightens a target’s vision and focus, optimizing them for ranged combat.  The magician runs his fingers down the target’s head, across his eyes and makes  a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic Defense. If successful, the target’s eyes  take on an unnatural appearance (unique to the caster). The target adds a +3 bonus  to their ranged Attack tests.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 bonus), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional  Target (+Rank)

Circle_2.Name: Astral Flare
Circle_2.Description: space This spell releases an intense flare of light into astral space. The spellcaster throws their hands and arms wide, and makes a Spellcasting test against the Mystic Defense of anyone in the area who is perceiving astral space in the area or looks at the area (this includes using the As- tral Sense spell). If successful, the astral flare blinds the viewer, who suffers Full Darkness penalties for the spell duration. Anyone affected by Baseline Subtraction (Player's Guide, p. 347) is unaffected by this spell, but it doesn't stop the ongoing effects if cast after the target is already affected by Astral Flare. It only prevents the effects.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Range (+10 yards)

Circle_2.Name: Clean
Circle_2.Description: This spell removes visible stains, dirt, or foreign substances from objects. The spellcaster makes wiping motions, sprinkles water on the objects, and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If suc- cessful, all affected targets are cleaned over the course of 10 minutes; metal is polished, clothing appears pressed, etc. A target can be a single ob- ject or a character and everything they're hold- ing and wearing. The spell only cleans substanc- es visible to the spellcaster and cannot remove disease or poison. Anyone wearing an outfit of affected items gains 2 to tests to improve a target's Attitude (Gamemaster's Guide, p. 142) or ask for favors (Gamemaster's Guide, p. 148), any gift given has 2 to any tests for it to be well-received, or 2 to similar situa- tions at the gamemaster's discretion.  Success Levels: Decrease Duration (-2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Decrease Duration (-2 minutes), Additional Targets (+rank)

Circle_2.Name: Entry Log
Circle_2.Description: This spell keeps a record of those who pass by it. The spellcaster in- scribes a small, personal glyph at their feet or on a wall and makes a Spell- casting (10) test. If successful, the spellcaster imbues the glyph with magic, glowing briefly. This glyph has a Detection Difficulty of 10. The Effect Step is compared against the Mystic Defense of every animated target that passes within the area. If successful, the glyph records the rough appearance of the target to an observer in text with the following information: apparent gender, apparent race, height, and build. Extra threads can be used to gather additional specific information; this must be something a casual observer would notice. For example, visible weapons can be recorded, but concealed items or anything that requires astral sensing cannot. The spellcaster can revisit the glyph at any time to review the record of those observed. The glyph and record are erased when the duration expires.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 hours)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 hours), Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Effect (2 Detection Difficulty), Increase Effect (One piece of additional information), Increase Area (2 yards)

Circle_2.Name: Makeshift Weapon
Circle_2.Description: This spell enchants a small non-magical object into a slim, extremely keen, melee weapon. The item weighs the same as it did before, so light ob- jects that can be easily wielded must be targeted. The spellcaster touches nearby items and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the object may be used as a melee weapon as normal and is a Size appropriate to the origi- nal object. The Effect Step is the weapon's Damage Step (Strength Step adds as usual). There's no penalty for an improvised weapon as the spell 'balanc- es' the weapon. Affected objects revert to their original form when the spell ends.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 Ef- fect Step), Additional Target (+rank)

Circle_2.Name: Search
Circle_2.Description: This spell enhances the spellcaster's ability to find what they're looking for. The spellcaster runs their hands down themselves, as if searching for something, and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, they gain +3 to Awareness tests when actively searching for something.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Effect (2)

Circle_2.Name: Sterilize
Circle_2.Effect: Removes disease or poison from an object
Circle_2.Description: This spell cleanses an object of disease or poison. The spellcaster rubs their wrists together, generating a white spark which leaps to the target ob- ject (the spellcaster doesn't actually touch the target object(s), despite the range), and makes a Spellcasting test against the highest disease and poison Step present (minimum 6). If successful, the object is cleansed of contam- inants. The spell is only effective against inanimate objects and cannot be cast on liquids or to affect an object specifically containing liquids (like a bucket or bottle) to affect the liquid inside. If cast on food, the food becomes sterile, losing flavor, texture, and all nutrition, and requires a Willpower (4) test to be consumed. But why bother? Additional successes allow the spellcaster to selectively remove con- taminants. Each additional success allows the spellcaster to not affect one contaminant. For three additional successes spent on making food edible, it retains its flavor, texture, and nutrition. The spellcaster has some idea what each contaminant is, but doesn't receive specifics unless they possess an ap- plicable knowledge skill.  Success Levels: Special (see description)  Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+1 additional success), Additional Tar- get (+1)

Circle_3.Name: Astral Targeting
Circle_3.Effect: Gain a +2 bonus to Spellcasting and Effect tests
Circle_3.Description: This spell allows the magician to improve their spells against a target he has astrally  sensed (pg. 209). The magician opens his eyes wide and glowing red light emits  from them, and then makes a Spellcasting test against his Mystic Defense. If successful,  glowing red runes float in front of his eyes and he gains a +2 to Spellcasting and  Effect tests against any target he has astrally sensed.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (minutes)

Circle_3.Name: Aura Strike
Circle_3.Description: This spell channels destructive energies into weak portions of the pattern of a  character who the magician has astrally sensed (p. 209). The magician furrows his  brows, squints, and then makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic Defense.  If successful, the Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted. The target suffers  a single Wound from the spell, regardless of the damage dealt.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional  Target (+1)

Circle_3.Name: Combat Fury
Circle_3.Effect: +2 bonus to close combat Attack tests
Circle_3.Description: This spell creates a state of battle fury in a willing target, energizing them into a  frenzy in combat. The magician rants and gesticulates violently, then touches the target  and makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic Defense. If successful, the  target gains a +2 bonus to close combat Attack tests. The target may only make close  combat attacks during the spell’s duration.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 bonus), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional  Targets (+Rank)

Circle_3.Name: Identify Magic
Circle_3.Description: This spell identifies the type of magic present on a person, place, or object. The  magician peers intently at the target, then makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s  Mystic Defense. If successful, the number of Successes determines what he  learns. One Success reveals whether the target is magical; two reveals the general  type of magic the target possesses—adept abilities, innate magic, spell magic, and so  on; three reveals the exact nature of the magic—the target’s Discipline and Circle in  the case of adepts, or the target’s powers and abilities in the case of magical items. Use  of this spell does not provide any information on key knowledges for thread items,  only that it is a thread item and a general sense of its powers.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (see text)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+1 Success), Increase Range (+10 yards)

Circle_3.Name: Levitate
Circle_3.Description: This spell moves objects or characters vertically up or down on an invisible  2-yard radius platform of force. The magician raises and lowers his hands and makes  a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense among all characters or objects  in the area of effect.  If successful, a platform is created which lifts those on it up or down at 4 yards per  round to a maximum height equal to the spell’s range. A single spell supports 1,000  pounds of weight.  The magician may “bootstrap” Levitate spells for improved effect. He may cast  another spell on an existing platform to increase the weight the spell can support.  The magician may also rise to the maximum height of the first Levitate spell and cast  another Levitate spell (or spells) to move even higher. Bootstrapped spells must be  managed carefully—as soon as any lower-altitude Levitate spell ends, all higher-altitude  Levitate spells also fail. Characters and objects on top of a platform when it fails  suffer Falling damage (see the Gamemaster’s Guide) based on the distance fallen.  Moving the platform up requires the magician’s concentration, regardless of how  many “bootstrapped” spells he is currently manipulating. If he loses concentration,  the platform automatically descends to the ground at 4 yards per round.  The magician must make a Spellcasting test if the number of characters or objects  on a platform increases, for example, if another character jumps onto it. If failed, the  spell ends.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 minutes), Increase Area (+2 yards)

Circle_3.Name: Wizard Mark
Circle_3.Description: This spell places a symbol or mark on the target’s astral pattern. The magician  makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic Defense. If successful, a mark is  placed on the target’s astral imprint, visible to anyone using astral sight (such as the  Astral Sight talent, p. 129) and which can serve to brand the target for a crime or other  offense.  The mark also serves as a link between the magician and the target. As such, it  allows the magician to cast spells on the target while he is within the magician’s line  of sight, as if the magician was touching the subject. The mark’s design is personal to  the magician. Rumors suggest that a Horror may have taught Namegivers this spell, so  its use is often regarded with suspicion.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 hours)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 hours), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional  Target (+1)

Circle_3.Name: Fulcrum
Circle_3.Description: This spell uses superior leverage to move targets. The spellcaster mo- tions as if pulling a lever towards the ground with both hands and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, the target is thrown 6 yards away from the spellcaster, takes half the distance thrown as falling damage (Gamemaster's Guide, p. 168), and must make a Knock- down test against the Effect Step. Use the scatter diagram (Player's Guide, p. 394) to determine the direction. If the target lands on someone, they must also make a Knockdown test against the Effect Step.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (2 yards)  Extra Threads: Increase Effect (2 yards), Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_3.Name: Makeshift Missile
Circle_3.Description: This spell enchants a small non-magical object into a deadly throwing weapon. The item weighs the same as it did before, so relatively small ob- jects that can be easily thrown, such as rocks, tankards, etc. must be target- ed. The spellcaster touches nearby items and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the object may be used as a thrown weapon as normal and is a Size appropriate to the original object. Characters may only throw objects affected by this spell of their minimum Size (1 for most Namegivers and 2 for large Namegivers, such as obsidimen and trolls). The Effect Step is the throwing weapon's Damage Step (Strength Step adds as usual); short range is 2-10 yards and long range is 11-20 yards. There's no penalty for throwing an unbalanced or improvised object as the spell 'streamlines' the missile. Affected objects revert to their original form at the end of the round after being thrown as a weapon (as opposed to being tossed to an ally) or when the spell ends.  Success Levels: Additional Target (+1 missile)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards to long range), Additional Target (+rank)

Circle_3.Name: Mental Library
Circle_3.Description: This spell increases the spellcaster's capacity for memorizing using Book Memory (Player's Guide, p. 132). The spellcaster rolls their eyes back in their head, begins murmuring rapidly while quickly flipping through the pages of a phantom book, and makes a Spellcasting (10) test. If successful, the spellcaster gains +3 ranks to Book Memory. This bonus cannot more than double the spellcaster's Book Memory rank (e.g., if the spellcaster has Book Memory rank 3, they cannot gain more than +3 ranks from this spell). If the spellcaster memorizes anything exceeding their normal Book Mem- ory rank limit, the new memories are at risk of being lost. They cannot be retrieved once the spell ends, even through use of abilities (including Book Memory knacks) that allow retrieval of otherwise lost memories. The spell- caster may only have one active version of this spell and it cannot be main- tained or otherwise continued. The duration must end before it is cast again.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (+1 hour)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+1 hour), Increase Effect (2 Book Memory ranks)

Circle_3.Name: Shatter Lock
Circle_3.Description: This spell forces locks open. The spellcaster makes a cracking sound, gestures toward the lock, and makes a Spellcasting test against the lock's Mystic Defense (typically 6 for non-magical locks); against magical locks, use the higher of the Mystic Defense and Dispel Difficulty. If successful, the Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted to the locking mech- anism (the lock's Physical Armor doesn't protect). Once the damage to a mundane lock's Death Rating is equaled, the lock opens and is destroyed in the process. The lock is clearly ruined on even a passing glance and any use of this spell (successful or not) is very loud. Most ordinary locks have a Death Rating from 8 to 12; a solid wood bar might have a Death Rating of 20 or more, depending on the size; metal bars start at a Death Rating of 18.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (2 Effect Step)  Extra Threads: Increase Effect (2 Effect Step)

Circle_3.Name: Silence Objects
Circle_3.Effect: 2 to Stealthy Stride and move at full Movement Rate
Circle_3.Description: This spell suppresses noise made by objects a willing target is carrying. The spellcaster takes an item from the target, puts it to their lips, makes a shushing noise, hands it back, and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If success- ful, all sounds from the target are muffled, though metal objects are notably so. This gives the target 2 to Stealthy Stride tests. The target can also move at their full Movement Rate while using Stealthy Stride.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Effect (2 to Stealthy Stride), Additional Targets (+rank)

Circle_3.Name: Temporary Erase
Circle_3.Description: This spell temporarily erases a contiguous section of writing. The spell- caster apologizes profusely for their affront under their breath as they weave threads, running their finger over the text, and makes a Spellcaster test against the text's Mystic Defense (minimum 6). If successful, a contig- uous section of text up to roughly a page in length is erased. It isn't covered up by magic, but gone as if it was never there. The text returns as though nothing happened when the spell ends.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (+10 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+10 minutes), Increase Effect (+1 page)

Circle_4.Name: Ball of String
Circle_4.Description: This spell conjures a ball made from strands of mystical energy. The magician ties  an imaginary knot to an object, marking the point of origin, and makes a Spellcasting  (6) test. If successful, a ball of magical string appears in his hand. The ball can be  placed in a pouch or pocket—the string pays out automatically as the magician walks.  The magician makes an Effect (10) test once per hour. If successful, the ball reels out  more string and remains untangled. If failed, the string snaps and the spell ends.  When the magician wants to return to where he started, he winds the string back  onto the ball. As he starts winding, the string glows with a white light. By following the  glowing thread, the magician is unerringly led back to the point of origin.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 hours)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 hours), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)

Circle_4.Name: Binding Threads
Circle_4.Description: This spell conjures a web of magical threads to entangle an opponent. The magician  points at the target and makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic  Defense. If successful, a mass of brightly-colored magical threads form in the air and  fly toward the target, entangling him in powerful magical bonds.  Each round, the target may make a Strength test against the Effect Step. If he fails,  he is bound and cannot use his hands to attack or cast spells and is Harried. If successful,  he is only Harried. Harried penalties do not apply to attempts to break free of  their bonds each round.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),  Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_4.Name: Evolved Consciousness
Circle_4.Effect: Grants a +4 bonus to Knowledge and Patterncraft tests
Circle_4.Description: This spell improves the target’s ability to recall and process information. The magician  centers himself with a ritual unique to each caster, but does not appear to be  casting a spell. When finished, the magician makes a Spellcasting test against his Mystic  Defense. If successful, he gains clarity in his thoughts and often a brusque attitude  with those who have not achieved this level of enlightenment. He gains a +4 to all  Knowledge and Patterncraft tests made for the duration of the spell.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 minutes), Increase Effect (+2 bonus)

Circle_4.Name: Juggler’s Touch
Circle_4.Description: This spell causes small objects to whirl around madly. The magician mimes juggling,  then makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense of any character  within the area of effect. If successful, any small objects within the area of effect  start spinning wildly around, striking those standing in the same area. The Effect test  determines how much damage is inflicted on each target.  The magician may shift the spell’s area of effect up to 2 yards with a successful  Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense of any character within the new  area of effect (even if they were previously affected). Juggling the objects requires the  magician’s concentration each round—the only action he can take without ending the  spell is a Spellcasting test to move the spell’s effects. If there are no small movable  objects in the area of effect, the spell has no effect.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),  Increase Area (+2 yards), Increase Range (+10 yards), Remove Targets (-Rank), Additional  Effect (requires 2 threads, Concentration for this spell as Simple Action.)

Circle_4.Name: Lighten Load
Circle_4.Description: This spell temporarily reduces the weight of objects within the area of effect. The  magician bends and grimaces as if lifting something heavy, then stands upright and  makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense among the objects in the  area of effect. If successful, the magician makes an Effect test, reducing the combined  weight of all of the objects by test result x50 pounds, to a minimum of 10 pounds.  The target objects must be stationary when the spell is cast.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 hours)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 hours), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),  Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase Area (+2 yards)

Circle_4.Name: Wizard’s Cloak
Circle_4.Effect: Increases Mystic Defense against attempts to detect target astrally
Circle_4.Description: This spell creates a magical cloak that masks the target’s presence. The magician  pantomimes placing a cloak over his shoulders and drawing the hood over his  head, then touches the target and makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic  Defense. If successful, a faintly shimmering cloak of mystical energy momentarily  appears and then vanishes into the target’s body. The target adds +6 to his Mystic  Defense against any spells or abilities intended to astrally detect his presence or gain  information about him.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 minutes), Increase Effect (+2 bonus), Increase  Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+Rank)

Circle_4.Name: Etch and Sketch
Circle_4.Effect: A finger makes an effective stylus
Circle_4.Description: This spell allows the spellcaster to write on any non-magical surface with their finger. The spellcaster runs a finger along a surface, taps against it as though their finger is out of ink, and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If suc- cessful, they can use their finger as a stylus to write or draw (no judgment) on any non-magical surface. This cannot be used to destroy or weaken the surface or cut through it by making consecutive passes on the same area, nor does it remove any of the affected material from the surface. All it does is write. Or draw. Again, no judgment.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes)

Circle_4.Name: Icy Protection
Circle_4.Effect: +3 Physical and Mystic Armor against fire
Circle_4.Description: Water-Cold. This spell increases a willing target's resistance to fire dam- age. The spellcaster pinches their nose and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the spellcaster gains +3 Physical and Mystic Armor against fire- based damage.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Effect (+1 Physical and Mystic Armor)

Circle_4.Name: Inventory
Circle_4.Description: This spell compiles a catalog of items. The spell is cast on a single room within range and requires a suitable writing surface. The spell- caster surveys the area, referring to the current- ly blank surface, and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the Spellcasting result is com- pared against the Mystic Defense of all items within the room inside the area. If successful, glowing writing appears on the writing surface, listing each item detected. The color and writing style are unique to the caster. The inventory is in alphabetical order and doesn't list insignificant items such as dust, bins, or crates without real value. The invento- ry takes one full minute to create regardless of how many items are in the room. If there are items unlisted on the inventory, whether due to their Mystic Defense or some other means, the final entry lists 'Inventory incomplete.' The list of items doesn't include details. For example, the number of books is indicated, but not their titles, a valuable grimoire in the form of carved bones isn't listed as a grimoire, but a collection of bones, etc. The duration cannot be reduced below 0 rounds due to additional successes, where the list is provided instantaneously.  Success Levels: Reduce Duration (-2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Reduce Duration (-2 rounds), Increase Area (2 yards)

Circle_4.Name: Mystic Vines
Circle_4.Description: This spell conjures magical energy in the form of softly glowing vines that grab a char- acter. The spellcaster animatedly waves their hands and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, glowing yellow magical constructs in the form of vines or roots erupt from the ground, grabbing and clutching at the target. The target is Harried un- til they escape. Each round, a target may make a Strength test against the Ef- fect Step as a Simple action. If successful, they break free and the spell ends.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 Ef- fect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_4.Name: Sanctuary
Circle_4.Description: This spell magically reinforces all portals and entrances to a building or room, reinforcing them to keep out intruders. The spell must be cast inside a dwelling, room, or other building, affecting the structure within a 10-yard radius from the spellcaster. The spellcaster touches a window or door and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the spellcaster adds their Effect test result to the Death Rating and their Wizard Circle to the Physical Armor of the structure of the building (doors, walls, ceilings, etc.). Damage inflicted to the structure remains when the spell ends. This does not lock or seal the doors, just makes them more difficult to destroy.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Effect (+5 Ef- fect Step, 2 Physical Armor), Increase Area (2 yards)

Circle_4.Name: Stick Together
Circle_4.Description: This spell bonds two targets tightly together. The spellcaster mimes put- ting their hands together and trying to pull them apart, points both hands (still stuck together) at the two targets and makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense among the targets. If successful, the targets in- stantly bond together as soon as they touch. The spellcaster can choose to bond two targets already in contact, such as a character and the floor (re- ducing their Movement Rate to 0), otherwise the targets must be adjacent. The gamemaster arbitrates how the targets are affected, such as being Har- ried, eliminating access to a limb, reducing Movement Rate, affecting Initia- tive, etc., depending on which parts are stuck. Each round, a target may make a Strength test against the Effect Step as a Simple action. If successful, the bond breaks and the spell ends.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Duration (min- utes), Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards)

Circle_5.Name: Flight
Circle_5.Description: This spell grants the power of flight. The magician flaps his arms up and down  and makes a Spellcasting test against his natural Mystic Defense. If successful, he  gains the ability to fly at a Movement Rate of 12.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+10 minutes)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+10 minutes), Increase Effect (+2 Movement  Rate)

Circle_5.Name: Giant Size
Circle_5.Effect: +4 bonus to Strength-only, Toughness-only, and Damage tests
Circle_5.Description: This spell causes a character to grow larger. The magician stands on tip toes or  puffs out his clothing, making himself look bigger, then makes a Spellcasting test  against the target’s Mystic Defense. If successful, the target immediately grows 50  percent larger than his normal size, gaining a +4 bonus to Strength-only, Toughness-  only, and Damage tests during the spell’s duration.  The target’s clothing and armor also change size, returning to normal when the  spell ends. Weapons and other equipment do not change size, however. Care should  be made when using this spell in confined spaces, such as kaers or tunnels.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 bonus), Increase  Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_5.Name: Mystic Shock
Circle_5.Description: This spell damages a character by channeling astral energy through an object or  surface. The spell does not require line of sight and can be cast through any object or  surface, including floors and walls, which both magician and target are touching. The  magician makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic Defense. If successful,  his Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional  Target (+1)

Circle_5.Name: Sever Talent
Circle_5.Effect: Removes the ability to use a talent
Circle_5.Description: This spell prevents an adept from using a talent. The magician mimes pulling a  thread with one hand, then cutting it with the other, and then makes a Spellcasting  test against the target’s Mystic Defense. If successful, the adept loses access to the last  talent he used until the end of the next round. If the target has been astrally sensed,  the magician may choose the talent from any of the last three the target used.  355   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional  Target (+1)

Circle_5.Name: Slow
Circle_5.Effect: Halves movement; –5 penalty to Dexterity-based tests
Circle_5.Description: This spell reduces movement. The magician pantomimes casting in slow motion,  then makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic Defense.  If successful, the target’s Movement Rate is halved (round down) and he suffers a  –5 penalty to his Dexterity-based tests, including Initiative tests.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (-2 penalty), Increase  Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_5.Name: Weapon Back
Circle_5.Description: This ritual spell creates a link between a weapon and a character, allowing the  weapon to find its way back should it somehow be lost. At dawn each day for a week,  the magician spends half an hour inscribing a small design on the weapon, using a  drop of his own blood. He weaves the first spell thread at the end of the week. The  magician then spends half an hour at dawn each day for another week, inscribing a  scar of the same design on the character to be linked to the weapon. He weaves the  last spell thread at the end of the second week.  Once the ritual is complete, the magician makes a Spellcasting test against the  character’s Mystic Defense. If successful, the designs glow brightly and then fade to  their normal state. A sympathetic link is created between the character and the weapon.  The death of a character or destruction of a weapon destroys the link between  them, causing both scar-design and weapon-inscription to fade away without a trace.  Anytime the weapon is lost to the character, he may make an Effect test (using  his own Willpower Step) against the weapon’s Mystic Defense. If successful, and if the  weapon is within the spell’s area of effect, it moves toward the character at a Movement  Rate of 6.  The character does not require line of sight to retrieve the weapon. Should  the weapon need to make an Attribute test—for example, to break out of a cabinet  (Strength) or slide along a narrow window-sill (Dexterity)—the character makes an  Effect test in place of the Attribute test.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 weeks)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 weeks), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),  Increase Range (+10 yards)

Circle_5.Name: Astral Wall
Circle_5.Description: This spell creates an astral barrier to block entry into a location. The spellcaster inscribes a personal glyph at the location, closes their eyes, plac- es their hands where they intend to create the wall, and makes a Spellcast- ing (10) test. If successful, the glyph appears suspended in mid-air briefly and a wall of cracking energy appears in astral space. This wall cannot share space with other astral imprints and automatically fits itself to the available space. This wall doesn't block anything also in the physical realm, only en- tities solely in astral space. The barrier has 5 Mystic Armor and 20 Death Rating. If an entity attempts to pass through the wall, the wall makes an Effect test and inflicts Mystic damage equal to the result. If an entity attacks the wall, the wall causes energy to strike at the attacker and makes an Effect test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, it inflicts Mystic dam- age equal to the Effect test result.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Effect (2 Ef- fect Step), Increase Area (2 yards wide), Increase Effect (2 Mystic Armor, +5 Death Rating)

Circle_5.Name: Book by the Cover
Circle_5.Description: This spell absorbs the information of written text merely by touching it. The spellcaster drums their fingers against the text once for each thread and makes a Spellcasting test against the text Mystic Defense (minimum 6); their Spellcasting Step (before Karma is spent) cannot exceed their Book Memory Step. If successful, the information is absorbed and memorized with Book Memory over the course of 10 minutes where the spellcaster must remain in contact with the text. If the spellcaster doesn't have space available for the text, they must either clear space or the spell fails.  Success Levels: Decrease Duration (-2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Decrease Duration (-2 minutes)

Circle_5.Name: Massive Missiles
Circle_5.Description: This spell increases the size and effectiveness of a thrown weapon or the projectiles fired from a missile weapon. The spellcaster touches the will- ing target's weapon with both hands, visibly transferring energy to it, and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the target gains +4 to Damage tests with the affected weapon. This bonus doesn't apply if used in close combat.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 Damage Step), Additional Target (+rank)

Circle_5.Name: Shield of Warping
Circle_5.Effect: -2 to Attack and Spellcasting tests against the target
Circle_5.Description: This spell causes weapons to bend and twist out of shape. The spell- caster bends and twists at space with their hands around the willing target and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the target is surrounded by a faint green field - the exact details are unique to the spellcaster - that causes physical and astral space to warp and bend; attacks otherwise be- come ineffective while in the field, giving -2 to Attack and Spellcasting tests that include the target.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (-1 to tests), Additional Targets (+rank)

Circle_5.Name: Thorny Retreat
Circle_5.Description: This spell conjures a barrier of magical energy in the form of blue thorns. The spellcaster pricks their hand and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, they summon and place a wall section within range for each success, each section filling the area with gnarled and twisted ghostly blue thorns. The exact appearance of the thorns is unique to the spellcaster - including varying color - though all appear as unnatural energy. Anyone passing through a thorn section makes a Dexterity test against the Effect Step. If successful, they pass through unscathed. If failed, the character is halted by the thorns and the Effect test determines how much Physical dam- age is inflicted. The thorns roll around the spellcaster like seaweed in water and are no hindrance to them.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (+1 section)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 Ef- fect Step), Increase Effect (+1 section), Increase Range (+10 yards)

Circle_5.Name: Ward of Warning
Circle_5.Description: Trap. This spell places a ward on an area. The spellcaster marks out the area of the spell (and can make a smaller area if desired) with personal, but distinctive glyphs, says a key word or phrase if desired, declares their warn- ing while weaving threads, and makes a Spellcasting (15) test. If successful, the ward is created, though the ward deactivates briefly for anyone who utters the correct phrase. This deactivates until they pass through, which could allow someone to sneak through under the right circumstances. If a target comes within 2-yards of the ward, the ward makes an Effect test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, the ward places the adept's glyph on the target and speaks the warning. If the target proceeds across the ward, the ward deals Mystic damage equal to the Effect test result and the target must make a Knockdown test against a Difficulty Number equal to the result before it is reduced by Armor. If the target is knocked down, they are also knocked back 4 yards. The ward can affect any number of targets in the same round.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 hours)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 hours), Increase Effect (2 Effect Step)

Circle_6.Name: Displace Self
Circle_6.Description: This spell moves the magician away from harm. The magician hops frantically up  and down, then makes a Spellcasting test against his own Mystic Defense. If successful,  he is imbued with a magical “sixth sense” which detects attacks targeted directly  or indirectly at him and automatically moves him out of harm’s way. This includes  attacks which Avoid Blow would normally be denied, such as Blindside or Surprise  attacks, but does not include those which Avoid Blow is never allowed, such as against  most spells.  Each time he is attacked, the magician may make an Avoid Blow test against the  Attack test. If successful, he moves 2 yards away, in a direction chosen by the magician.  If there are any intervening obstacles, he moves as far as he can, then stops. If  the distance moved is insufficient to evade the attack, the magician is still affected.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)

Circle_6.Name: Energy Shield
Circle_6.Effect: Creates a shield of energy to deflect incoming attacks
Circle_6.Description: This spell creates a shield which can be used to parry physical attacks and spells.  The magician extends his hand and clenches it into a fist, and then makes a Spellcasting  test against the target’s Mystic Defense. If successful, their offhand is surrounded  with glowing blue energy which can be extended into a shield just in front of their  hand. When in use, this shield gives a +4 ranks to Avoid Blow and Steel Thought and  the target may use either as a default skill. The bonus to Steel Thought only applies  to spells which have a visible component spells (e.g. Earth Darts). When this spell is  active, the target cannot use a weapon with their offhand, but can still use their hand  to hold a shield or cast spells freely.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (minutes), Increase Effect (+2 bonus), Increase  Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+Rank)

Circle_6.Name: Loan Spell
Circle_6.Description: This spell gives a character temporary access to a spell matrix. The magician designates  which of his current spell matrices is being loaned, then tosses the target a  small object, such as a coin or token, and makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s  Mystic Defense. If successful, the target can cast the spell attuned to the “loaned” matrix.  The target uses his own Spellcasting and appropriate Thread Weaving talents to  cast the loaned spell. He must be capable of weaving any necessary threads for the  loaned spell or have them woven already, as in the case of a “loaned” Enhanced Matrix.  If the target does not know the Spellcasting talent or skill, he makes a Perception test  in place of a Spellcasting test. While the spell matrix is on loan, the magician cannot  use it to cast or reattune the spell stored in it.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase  Effect (Matrix is shared between target and caster; 2 threads)

Circle_6.Name: Rampage
Circle_6.Effect: Grants a +3 bonus to close combat Attack and Damage tests
Circle_6.Description: This spell releases the repressed aggression of those standing near to the caster.  The magician points at each target in turn then releases a bloodcurdling scream and  makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense among the target group.  If successful, the affected targets gain a +3 bonus to close combat Attack and Damage  tests. They must also adopt the Aggressive Attack stance each round (it still costs  Strain). The magician may affect up to Spellcasting Rank willing targets.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 bonus), Increase  Range (+2 yards)

Circle_6.Name: Razor Orb
Circle_6.Effect: WIL+7/Physical and reduces Physical Armor by -4
Circle_6.Description: This spell creates a gleaming, spinning, orb of green light and force that is directed  to deliver a devastating strike against a tough opponent. The magician makes a  Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic Defense. If successful, the magician’s Effect  test determines how much damage is inflicted. The target’s Physical Armor is reduced  by 4 until repairs can be made (or it repairs itself in the case of Thread items).   Success Levels: Increase Effect (-2 to Physical Armor)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Effect (-2 to Physical  Armor), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_6.Name: Sleep
Circle_6.Description: This spell causes one or more characters to fall into a deep sleep. The magician  yawns widely and then makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense  among the target group. If successful, the targets immediately fall into a magical slumber,  waking only if they take any damage or the spell ends. Each round, a sleeping target  may make a Willpower test against the magician’s Willpower Step. If successful, he  wakes up. The spell only affects characters or creatures that need sleep—it does not  work against most undead, for example. The magician may affect up to Spellcasting  Rank targets.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 Willpower  Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase Area (+2 yards)

Circle_6.Name: Battering Ram
Circle_6.Description: This unsubtle spell pulverizes inanimate objects. The spellcaster slams a fist into their palm, punches at the target, and makes a Spellcasting (10) test. If successful, a briefly visible cylinder of force with the spellcaster's glyph on the striking surface slams into the designated area, smashing all in- animate objects and making a great deal of noise and excitement. The Effect test result determines how much Physical damage is inflicted. Anything con- trolled by a character (e.g. things they're holding and wearing) is unaffected. This is typically used to punch holes in walls, quickly pulverize rocks, punish unattended tables, or whatever tomfoolery Wizards get up to these days.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (2)  Extra Threads: Increase Effect (2), Increase Range (+10 yards), In- crease Area (2 yards)

Circle_6.Name: Behind Eye
Circle_6.Effect: Allows target to see behind them
Circle_6.Description: The spell creates a symbolic eye in the back of a willing target's head. The spellcaster chants softly, draws their personal glyph on the back of the target's head, and makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, a symbolic eye unique to the spellcaster appears in mystic, blue flame on the back of the target's head. The target sees through the eye in the back of their head, though the sight is rudimentary and the eye has no special power to see in the dark or astral space, even if the target possesses this ability. The target requires an additional opponent to be Harried and cannot be Blindsided by attackers behind them. The target suffers a -6 penalty to Awareness tests relying on the eye.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Duration (min- utes), Increase Effect (reduce penalty by 2), Additional Target (+rank)

Circle_6.Name: Bouncing Blaster
Circle_6.Description: Trap. This spell fills the ground of the area with magical bombs, creating a minefield trap. The spellcaster extracts a pinch of saltpeter, sprinkles it around, touches the ground, and makes a Spellcasting (10) test. If success- ful, the area is primed with up to the spellcaster's Wizard Circle in magical bombs and determines exactly where within the area each bomb is located. Bombs must be at least two yards apart. Once primed, when any character (including the spellcaster ) moves within 2 yards of a bomb, it bounces into the air, trailing colorful sparks and explodes. Spellcasters typically have unique colors and displays for their bombs, creating a violent and deadly show for those around. The spellcaster's Effect test determines how much Mystic damage is inflicted to all characters within 2 yards of the bomb. The Detection Difficulty and Disarm Difficulty of the bombs is the Effect Step. The spellcaster can cast this spell Wizard Circle times per day and only one may be cast in a 10-yard radius at a time.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 hours)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 hours), Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Area (2 yards), Additional Bombs (2 bombs)

Circle_6.Name: Force Barrier
Circle_6.Description: This spell creates a vertical barrier to block entry into a location. The spellcaster inscribes a personal glyph at the location, holds their hands up where they intend the wall to go, stretches them along the length, and makes a Spellcasting (10) test. If successful, the wall glows briefly with the spellcaster's glyph along the length and the spellcaster speaks the password or phrase if any. Whenever something moving attempts to pass the glyph (this includes projectiles), the translucent energy barrier - up to 4 yards wide and tall - springs to life and blocks passage in either direction. Speak- ing the password or phrase deactivates the barrier until they pass through, which could allow someone to sneak through under the right circumstances. The barrier has 5 Physical and Mystic Armor, and 20 Death Rating.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 hours)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 hours), Increase Effect (+1 Physi- cal and Mystic Armor and +5 Death Rating), Increase Area (2 yards wide) Multi-Missile Threads: 0 Weaving: 10/15 Casting: 10 Range: Touch Duration: 2 rounds Effect: Creates additional projectiles This spell adds additional projectiles to a willing character's ranged at- tack. The spellcaster mimics loading or throwing a weapon of the same type the target is wielding, then touches the target's weapon with both hands, visibly transferring energy to it, and makes a Spellcasting (10) test. If suc- cessful, an additional projectile formed from pure energy of the appropriate type is added to the target's next attack. The appearance of the projectile, such as color, designs, etc., is unique to each spellcaster. Even if the projec- tile type differs, the same spellcaster's projectiles are clearly distinct in be- longing to that spellcaster. Each additional projectile adds +3 Damage to the next attack. If the projectiles aren't used by the end of the next round, they disappear.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (+1 projectile)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (+1 pro- jectile), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_6.Name: Sky Lattice
Circle_6.Description: This spell creates a shimmering web of energy. The spellcaster makes a series of crisscross gestures in the air, then makes a Spellcasting (6) test. If successful, the lattice appears within reach of the spellcaster - it's at- tached to the air and needs not touch the ground. A sky lattice is always 2 yards wide, but the spellcaster may vary the length up to the spell's range. The force of the lattice helps those climbing it - the climber gains the Effect Step as a bonus against anything that would dislodge them, such as a Knock- down effect. The grip doesn't hinder their movement in any way and they don't need to make Climbing tests to scale the sky lattice. A sky lattice can support a maximum of 2000 pounds at one time.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (+10 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+10 minutes), Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Effect (+500 pounds)

Circle_7.Name: Call
Circle_7.Description: This spell delivers a message over a great distance. The message must contain no  more words than the magician’s Spellcasting Rank and must be sent to someone the  magician knows within range. The magician opens and closes his mouth as if talking,  then makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic Defense. If successful, the  target sees and hears a magical image of the magician speaking the message. The target  receives only the information that the magician chooses to send, whether a threat,  a warning, a cry for help, or a simple greeting. The spell allows only one-way communication—  the magician knows if the spell succeeded but cannot tell if the target  understood the message, nor can he learn anything about the target’s current location  and condition.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+Rank words)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+Rank words), Increase Range (+20 miles)

Circle_7.Name: Confusing Weave
Circle_7.Description: This spell confounds a magician’s ability to weave spell threads.  The magician shakes his head from side to side and makes a Spellcasting test  against the highest Mystic Defense among the target group, +1 for each target after  the first (any targets the magician has astrally sensed do not increase the Difficulty  Number). If successful, he compares his Effect test against each target’s Thread Weaving  Step. If successful, affected targets fail to weave threads into their own spells—  they lose all of the spell threads they are weaving or have woven. The magician may  affect up to Spellcasting Rank targets.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase  Area (+2 yards),

Circle_7.Name: Dislodge Spell
Circle_7.Description: This spell disrupts a random spell from a spell matrix. The target must have one  or more spell matrices, including matrix objects. The magician squints his eyes and  makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic Defense. If successful, the gamemaster  randomly selects one of the target’s spell matrices. If the target has been astrally  sensed, the spell in the matrix is revealed and the magician may force a different  spell matrix to be selected (the magician does not know the spell in this matrix).  The magician makes an Effect test against a Dispel Difficulty based on the chosen  spell matrix’s Rank (see Dispelling Magic, p. 265). If successful, the matrix is wiped  clean of all spells it currently contains, leaving it empty. If a spell in the affected matrix  is currently in the process of being cast, the target can choose to abort the spell or  complete it using raw magic. This spell can target any type of spell matrix—Standard,  Enhanced, Armor, or Shared—or matrix object. The spell matrix wiped by this spell  may be reattuned to hold a new spell or the spell it previously contained.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional  Target (+1)

Circle_7.Name: Hypervelocity
Circle_7.Description: This spell accelerates a small object about the size of a pebble to incredible  speeds. The magician extends their arm and points at the target, levitating the object  just in front of their finger. When the spell is complete, he whispers “Boom” and  makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic Defense. If successful, the object  crosses the span in an instant and perforates the target causing damage equal to the  Effect test with no armor providing protection.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional  Target (+1)

Circle_7.Name: Mystic Net
Circle_7.Description: This spell is an area-effect version of the Binding Threads spell (p. 351). The magician  mimics tying several lengths of string together in a complex knot, then makes  a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense among any character within the  area of effect. If successful, a mass of glowing magical threads leaps from his hands,  forming a net to entangle the targets. Each round, an affected target may make a  Strength test against the Effect Step. If he fails, he is bound and cannot use his hands  to attack or cast spells and is Harried. If successful, he is only Harried. Harried penalties  do not apply to attempts to break free of their bonds each round. The magician  may affect up to Spellcasting Rank targets.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),  Increase Area (+2 yards)

Circle_7.Name: Spellstore
Circle_7.Effect: Temporarily store a spell within an object
Circle_7.Description: This spell places a spell pattern within an object, allowing the spell to be cast at  a later time. The object can be anything and does not require any special enchanting.  The magician touches the object and makes a Spellcasting test against the Dispel  Difficulty of the spell to be stored. If successful, the spell is placed within the object.  Anyone holding the object can cast the spell using his own Spellcasting talent as if  from a spell matrix. If the spell requires threads, the caster must know the appropriate  Thread Weaving talent. The object’s wielder must be touching it to cast the spell  stored within.  Once the stored spell has been cast, or the Spellstore spell ends, the spell pattern  vanishes from the item.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 hours)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 hours)

Circle_7.Name: Arcane Hammer
Circle_7.Description: This spell creates a cylinder of force, striking the target from above. The spellcaster slams their fist into their palm, grinds it there, and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, the Effect test determines how much Physical damage is inflicted and the target makes a Knockdown test against the damage inflicted. If they're Knocked Down, they're pinned and cannot take other actions while pinned. They must suc- ceed at a Strength test as a Simple action against the Effect Step to end the effect. Otherwise, the effect lasts until the end of the next round.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (2)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2), In- crease Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_7.Name: Astral Gift
Circle_7.Description: This spell allows a willing target to view astral space. The spellcaster squints and makes a Spellcasting (10) test. If successful, the target gains the Astral Sight talent (Player's Guide, p. 129) at rank 1. The rank provided can- not exceed the spellcaster's Astral Sight rank. The spellcaster can only have one active version of this spell at a time.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Effect (+1 As- tral Sight rank), Additional Targets (+rank)

Circle_7.Name: Doom Missile
Circle_7.Description: This spell creates a lance of purple energy surrounded by glyphs which engulfs the target with a series of ongoing astral explosions. The spellcaster gesticulates wildly with their hands and arms, and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful, the lance shoots from the spellcaster to the target, who is surrounded by shifting purple energy and glyphs. The spellcaster makes an Effect test each round to determine how much Mystic damage is inflicted.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (2 Effect Step)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (2 Ef- fect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_7.Name: Move on Through
Circle_7.Description: This spell forces a character into continuous movement. The spellcast- er nods their head at a moving target, bows low in a mocking fashion, and makes a Spellcasting test against the target's Mystic Defense. If successful and the Effect Step is at least equal to the target's Strength Step, the target is forced to continue their current movement in the same direction and at the same speed at the start of their next turn. After the target moves the same distance in the same direction as their previous movement, they may continue their turn as normal. The target is still restricted to their maximum Movement Rate.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (2 to Effect Step)  Extra Threads: Increase Effect (2 to Effect Step), Increase Effect (2 yards to forced movement distance), Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_7.Name: Silver Shadow
Circle_7.Description: This spell causes mundane metal objects to turn gauzy and insubstan- tial. The spellcaster waves a hand in front of their face, inhaling and exhaling gently, then makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense in the area. If successful, all metal objects - weapons, armor, coins, tools, etc. - turn into silvery shadow-like versions of the originals. The objects lose their intended use and no longer have substance during the spell's duration - tools don't carve, dig, or sew, weapons cannot harm an opponent, armor provides no protection, and so on. Pattern items, thread items, creatures, spirits, and Namegivers with living metal, and objects constructed primarily from non-metal materials are unaffected.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 minutes)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 minutes), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase Area (2 yards), Remove Targets (-rank)

Circle_7.Name: Star Shower
Circle_7.Description: This spell sprays ghostly, multicolored sparks from the spellcaster's outstretched hands, accelerating through the area and flash- ing brightly when they touch a living pattern. The spellcaster stretches out their hands, spins, intones words of magic that sound suspiciously like 'Wheeeee!' and makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense of targets in the area. If successful, the Effect test determines how much Mystic damage is inflicted on each target.  Success Levels: Increase Effect (2)  Extra Threads: Increase Effect (2), In- crease Area (2 yards)

Circle_8.Name: Astral Catastrophe
Circle_8.Effect: WIL+5/Mystic and -2 to all Action tests
Circle_8.Description: This spell unleashes mystic energy across both astral and physical realities within  the area of effect. The magician makes a dramatic tearing motion with both hands and  makes a Spellcasting test against the highest Mystic Defense of all characters within  the area. If successful, chaotic energy pours into the area in both astral and physical  space. The Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted to anyone within the  area of effect each round the spell is active. Additionally, any characters who have taken  damage spell suffer a -2 penalty to all Action tests until the end of the round. The  caster is not affected by the spell.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),  Increase Effect (-2 penalties), Increase Range (+10 yards), Increase Area (+2 yards)

Circle_8.Name: Catch Spell
Circle_8.Description: This spell captures other spells. The magician mimics catching an object, then  makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic Defense. If successful, he may  make an Effect test against the Spellcasting test result of any spell the target casts  directly at him. If successful, the magician catches the spell and may hold it until his  Catch Spell ends or he makes a Spellcasting test to cast the caught spell at a legitimate  target within the caught spell’s range, including the original caster. When recast, the  caught spell’s effects use the original caster’s statistics. If the magician is holding a  caught spell when his Catch Spell ends, the spell affects him normally. The magician  cannot cast any other spells until he recasts the caught spell or his Catch Spell ends.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)

Circle_8.Name: Compression Bubble
Circle_8.Description: This spell traps a character inside a bubble of magical energy. The magician cups  his hands together as if holding a ball, then releases them and makes a Spellcasting  test against the target’s Mystic Defense. If successful a field of energy forms into a  flexible, but resilient, bubble around the target.  The magician’s Effect test determines how much damage is inflicted, as the bubble  squeezes the target and constricts his actions.  Each round, the magician must concentrate on squeezing the bubble to inflict  additional damage to the target, or he may choose to move away and leave the target  trapped until the spell ends. The bubble may be torn open from the outside by reducing  its Death Rating to zero. Treat the bubble as a barrier with 10 Physical and Mystic  Armor and a Death Rating of 20. The target may break out of the bubble by making  a successful Strength test against the Effect Step. Weapons or spells wielded by the  target have no effect against the bubble’s interior.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step),  Increase Range (+10 yards), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_8.Name: Karma Cancel
Circle_8.Description: This spell temporarily neutralizes a character’s ability to use Karma. The magician  snaps his fingers and makes a Spellcasting test against the target’s Mystic Defense.  If successful, he may cancel any attempt by the target to use Karma by spending  one of his own Karma Points. Neither character rolls Karma Dice, but the Karma  Points spent by both parties are lost. Each round, the target may attempt a Willpower  test against the Spellcasting test result. If successful, the spell ends and the target  regains his ability to use Karma.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Range (+10 yards)

Circle_8.Name: Spell Cage
Circle_8.Effect: -5 penalty to Spellcasting and Thread Weaving tests
Circle_8.Description: This spell captures a character in a magical cage. The magician makes a descending  whistling sound, followed by a “clang!” and makes a Spellcasting test against the  target’s Mystic Defense. If successful, a cage forms around the target—the target must  fit within the cage or the spell automatically fails. Once conjured, the cage cannot be  moved.  The target cannot move from the cage, as it has no door. While trapped, the target  suffers a –5 penalty to Spellcasting and Thread Weaving tests, including attempts to  cast spells against the cage itself. The cage may be broken by attacks; treat the cage as  a barrier with 10 Physical and Mystic Armor and a Death Rating of 40.   Success Levels: Increase Duration (+2 rounds)   Extra Threads: Increase Duration (+2 rounds), Increase Effect (-1 penalty), Increase  Effect (+10 Death Rating), Additional Target (+1)

Circle_8.Name: Spell Snatcher
Circle_8.Description: This spell seizes a spell from a magician’s spell matrix and places it in one of the  magician’s own matrices. Magicians commonly replace their Spell Snatcher spell with  the snatched spell, but may replace any of the spells in their matrices. The magician  makes a Spellcasting test against the target magician’s Mystic Defense. If successful,  the gamemaster randomly selects one of the target’s spell matrices. The magician  makes an Effect test against a Dispel Difficulty based on the Spell Circle. If successful,  the spell leaves the target’s matrix and appears in one of the caster’s matrices. The  snatched spell remains in the magician’s spell matrix until cast or replaced, depending  on the spell.  If casting the snatched spell is beyond the magician’s abilities (he does not have  the proper Thread Weaving talent or is not a high enough Circle), he may still cast  it from the matrix as if it were cast from a grimoire which he has attuned (p. 252).  Either way, the snatched spell vanishes from his spell matrix as soon as it is cast. If  the magician is capable of casting the snatched spell, he may use it normally, in which  case the spell remains in his spell matrix until replaced by another spell or erased by  a Reattuning failure. If the snatched spell is unknown to the magician, he can attempt  a Patterncraft test to learn the spell (see Learning Spells, p. 251). If successful, he may  spend the appropriate Legend Points to add the spell to his grimoire.   Success Levels: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step)   Extra Threads: Increase Effect (+2 Effect Step), Increase Range (+10 yards)

Circle_8.Name: Arcane Guard
Circle_8.Effect: Creates a field with 30 Death Rating
Circle_8.Description: This spell creates a sheath of magic to pro- tect the willing target. The spellcaster tosses a pinch of crystal powder over themselves and makes a Spellcasting (10) test. If successful, they're surrounded by a field of softly glowing white energy - this doesn't provide enough light to see by, but does make them easy to see in non-magical darkness. Damaging effects that would strike the spellcaster damage the field in- stead, causing it to glow brightly in the location and briefly display the spellcaster's personal glyph at the impact. The field has 30 Death Rat- ing. If an effect destroys it, the excess damage is lost.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 rounds)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 rounds), Increase Effect (+10 Death Rating)

Circle_8.Name: Dispelling Glyph
Circle_8.Description: Trap. This spell creates a magical trap that removes active magical ef- fects from the victims. The spellcaster inscribes a small, personal glyph at their feet or on a wall and makes a Spellcasting (10) test. If successful, the spellcaster imbues the glyph with energy and speaks the password or phrase if any. Speaking the password or phrase deactivates the barrier until they pass through, which could allow someone to sneak through under the right circumstances. The Effect Step is compared against the Dispel Difficul- ty of every spell effect Dispel Magic could affect that passes within the area; this doesn't affect talents. If successful, the effect is dispelled. This doesn't affect effects with a duration measured in days or greater. The glyph has a Detection Difficulty of 10. The Effect Step cannot exceed the spellcaster's Dispel Magic Step.  Success Levels: Increase Duration (2 hours)  Extra Threads: Increase Duration (2 hours), Increase Effect (2 Effect Step), Increase Effect (2 Detection Difficulty), Increase Area (2 yards)

Circle_8.Name: Echo Blow
Circle_8.Description: This spell enchants a willing target to have a second, delayed attack. The spellcaster says onomatopoeia, touches the target, and makes a Spellcast- ing (10) test. If successful, the word they said echoes around and the next successful close combat attack the target makes has an echo blow, struck at the same time.
